You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 23.5 (commit: 7512b511).

## Issue to Resolve

UI Modernization Posts: Implement "comments" option tap
Figma Design eYeHXEMDbnFptE40xUqZ2T-fi-836_5909
```[tasklist]
### Tasks
- [x] Apply logic to launch directly into post comments on tap
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/PostActionHandler.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/PostListAction.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/viewmodel/posts/PostListItemUiStateHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.content.ClipData
  4→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
  5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.push.NativeNotificationsUtils
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFeatureUtils
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFlowSource
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.MediaPickerLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.RemotePreviewLogicHelper.RemotePreviewType
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefs
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stories.intro.StoriesIntroDialogFragment
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.clipboardManager
 20→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.ToastMessageHolder
 21→
 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}
136→

 68→/**
 69→ * Helper class which encapsulates logic for creating UiStates for items in the PostsList.
 70→ */
 71→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 72→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 73→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 74→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 75→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 76→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 77→) {
 78→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 79→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 80→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 81→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 82→        post: PostModel,
 83→        site: SiteModel,
 84→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 85→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 86→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 87→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 88→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 89→        formattedDate: String,
 90→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 91→        isSearch: Boolean,
 92→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 93→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 94→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 95→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 96→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 97→
 98→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
 99→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
100→        }
101→        val buttonTypes = createButtonTypes(
102→            postStatus = postStatus,
103→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
104→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
105→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
106→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
107→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
108→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
109→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
110→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
111→                site,
112→                postStatus,
113→                post
114→            ),
115→        )
116→        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
117→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
118→
119→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
120→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
121→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
122→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
123→
124→        val title =
125→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
126→
127→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
128→            postStatus,
129→            formattedDate,
130→            post.authorDisplayName,
131→            authorFilterSelection,
132→            isSearch,
133→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
134→        )
135→        val statuses = getStatuses(
136→            postStatus = postStatus,
137→            post = post,
138→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
139→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
140→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
141→        )
142→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
143→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
144→        val onSelected = {
145→            when (postStatus) {
146→                TRASHED -> {
147→                    onAction.invoke(
148→                        post,
149→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
150→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
151→                    )
152→                }
153→
154→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
155→                    post,
156→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
157→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
158→                )
159→            }
160→        }
161→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
162→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
163→            localPostId = localPostId,
164→            title = title,
165→            excerpt = excerpt,
166→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
167→            postInfo = postInfo,
168→            statuses = statuses,
169→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
170→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
171→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
172→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
173→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
174→            ),
175→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
176→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
177→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
178→            ),
179→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
180→        )
181→
182→        return PostListItemUiState(
183→            data = itemUiData,
184→            moreActions = moreActions,
185→            onSelected = onSelected
186→        )
187→    }
188→
189→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
190→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
191→        postStatus: PostStatus,
192→        formattedDate: String,
193→        displayName: String?,
194→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
195→        isSearch: Boolean,
196→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
197→    ): List<UiString> {
198→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
199→
200→        if (isSearch) {
201→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
202→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
203→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
205→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
206→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
207→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
209→            }
210→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
211→        }
212→
213→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
214→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
215→        }
216→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
217→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
218→        }
219→        return uiStrings
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
225→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
226→    }
227→
228→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
229→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236→        return parts.first()
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun getProgressBarState(
240→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
241→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
242→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
243→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
244→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
245→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
246→            } else {
247→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate
248→            }
249→        } else {
250→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden
251→        }
252→    }
253→
254→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
255→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
256→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
260→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
261→        postStatus: PostStatus,
262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels
289→    }
290→
291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {
299→                AppLog.e(
300→                    POSTS,
301→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
302→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
303→                )
304→                return null
305→            }
306→        }
307→    }
308→
309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {
316→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
317→            uploadUiState,
318→            postStatus,
319→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
320→            hasAutoSave
321→        )
322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
325→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
326→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
327→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
328→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
329→            }
330→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
331→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
332→            }
333→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
334→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }
340→        return labels
341→    }
342→
343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
344→        return when {
345→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
351→            )
352→
353→            else -> {
354→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
355→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
357→                } else {
358→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
359→                }
360→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
361→            }
362→        }
363→    }
364→
365→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
366→        return when {
367→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
368→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
369→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
370→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
371→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
372→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
373→            }
374→
375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
378→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
379→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
380→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
381→            }
382→
383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
384→        }
385→    }
386→
387→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
388→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
389→        return performingCriticalAction ||
390→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
391→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
392→    }
393→
394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(
429→                when {
430→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
431→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
432→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
433→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
434→                }
435→            )
436→        }
437→
438→        if (canShowViewButton) {
439→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowStats) {
443→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowCopy) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
448→        }
449→
450→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
451→
452→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
454→        }
455→
456→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
458→        }
459→
460→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
461→
462→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
463→    }
464→
465→    private fun sortPostListButtons(list: List<PostListButtonType>): List<PostListButtonType> {
466→        return list.sortedWith(compareBy(
467→            { it.groupId },
468→            { it.positionInGroup }
469→        ))
470→    }
471→
472→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
473→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
474→    }
475→
476→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
477→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
478→        postStatus: PostStatus
479→    ) {
480→        when {
481→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
482→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
483→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
484→        }
485→    }
486→
487→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
488→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
489→
490→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
491→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
492→        }
493→    }
494→
495→    private fun createMoreActions(
496→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
497→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
498→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
499→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
500→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
501→        }
502→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
503→    }
504→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.widgets
  2→
  3→import androidx.annotation.AttrRes
  4→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes
  5→import androidx.annotation.StringRes
  6→import org.wordpress.android.R
  7→import com.google.android.material.R as MaterialR
  8→
  9→private const val VIEW_GROUP_ID = 1
 10→private const val TAKE_AN_ACTION_GROUP_ID = 2
 11→private const val SHARE_AND_PROMOTE_GROUP_ID = 3
 12→private const val NAVIGATE_GROUP_ID = 4
 13→private const val TRASH_GROUP_ID = 5
 14→private const val OTHER_GROUP_ID = 6
 15→
 16→// PostListButton.java types - from attrs.xml
 17→enum class PostListButtonType constructor(
 18→    val value: Int,
 19→    @StringRes val textResId: Int,
 20→    @DrawableRes val iconResId: Int,
 21→    @AttrRes val colorAttrId: Int,
 22→    val groupId: Int,
 23→    val positionInGroup: Int
 24→) {
 25→    BUTTON_EDIT(
 26→        1,
 27→        R.string.button_edit,
 28→        R.drawable.gb_ic_pencil,
 29→        MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface,
 30→        VIEW_GROUP_ID,
 31→        1
 32→    ),
 33→    BUTTON_VIEW(
 34→        2,
 35→        R.string.button_view,
 36→        R.drawable.gb_ic_external,
 37→        MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface,
 38→        VIEW_GROUP_ID,
 39→        1
 40→    ),
 41→    BUTTON_PREVIEW(
 42→        3,
 43→        R.string.button_preview,
 44→        R.drawable.gb_ic_globe,
 45→        MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface,
 46→        VIEW_GROUP_ID,
 47→        2
 48→    ),
 49→    BUTTON_STATS(
 50→        4,
 51→        R.string.button_stats,
 52→        R.drawable.gb_ic_chart_bar,

 10→import com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayoutMediator
 11→import org.wordpress.android.R
 12→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 13→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
 14→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat.COMMENT_FILTER_CHANGED
 15→import org.wordpress.android.databinding.UnifiedCommentActivityBinding
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.LocaleAwareActivity
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentFilter.ALL
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentFilter.APPROVED
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentFilter.PENDING

 25→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 26→import javax.inject.Inject
 27→import android.R as AndroidR
 28→import com.google.android.material.R as MaterialR
 29→
 30→class UnifiedCommentsActivity : LocaleAwareActivity() {
 31→    @Inject
 32→    lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 33→
 34→    @Inject
 35→    lateinit var analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 36→
 37→    @Inject
 38→    lateinit var selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository
 39→    private lateinit var viewModel: UnifiedCommentActivityViewModel
 40→
 41→    private val commentListFilters = listOf(ALL, PENDING, UNREPLIED, APPROVED, SPAM, TRASHED)
 42→
 43→    private var disabledTabsOpacity: Float = 0F
 44→
 45→    private lateinit var pagerAdapter: UnifiedCommentListPagerAdapter
 46→
 47→    private var binding: UnifiedCommentActivityBinding? = null
 48→
 49→    public override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 50→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 51→        (application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 52→
 53→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory).get(UnifiedCommentActivityViewModel::class.java)
 54→        val disabledAlpha = TypedValue()
 55→        resources.getValue(MaterialR.dimen.material_emphasis_disabled, disabledAlpha, true)
 56→        disabledTabsOpacity = disabledAlpha.float
 57→
 58→        if (selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite() == null) {
 59→            ToastUtils.showToast(this@UnifiedCommentsActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 60→            finish()
 61→        }
 62→
 63→        binding = UnifiedCommentActivityBinding.inflate(layoutInflater).apply {
 64→            setContentView(root)
 65→            setupActionBar()
 66→            setupContent()
 67→            setupObservers()
 68→        }
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    // for some reason lint is not happy about VIEW_PAGER_OFFSCREEN_PAGE_LIMIT, even through it's a valid constant
 72→    @SuppressLint("WrongConstant")
 73→    private fun UnifiedCommentActivityBinding.setupContent() {
 74→        viewPager.offscreenPageLimit = VIEW_PAGER_OFFSCREEN_PAGE_LIMIT
 75→
 76→        pagerAdapter = UnifiedCommentListPagerAdapter(commentListFilters, this@UnifiedCommentsActivity)
 77→        viewPager.adapter = pagerAdapter
 78→
 79→        viewPager.registerOnPageChangeCallback(object : ViewPager2.OnPageChangeCallback() {
 80→            override fun onPageSelected(position: Int) {
 81→                val properties: MutableMap<String, String?> = HashMap()
 82→                properties["selected_filter"] = getString(commentListFilters[position].toTrackingLabelResId())
 83→                AnalyticsTracker.track(COMMENT_FILTER_CHANGED, properties)
 84→                super.onPageSelected(position)
 85→            }
 86→        })
 87→
 88→        TabLayoutMediator(tabLayout, viewPager) { tab, position ->
 89→            tab.setText(commentListFilters[position].labelResId)
 90→        }.attach()
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    private fun UnifiedCommentActivityBinding.setupActionBar() {
 94→        setSupportActionBar(toolbarMain)
 95→        supportActionBar?.let {
 96→            it.setHomeButtonEnabled(true)
 97→            it.setDisplayHomeAsUpEnabled(true)
 98→        }
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun UnifiedCommentActivityBinding.setupObservers() {
102→        @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
103→        lifecycleScope.launchWhenStarted {
104→            viewModel.uiState.collect { uiState ->
105→                viewPager.isUserInputEnabled = uiState.isTabBarEnabled
106→                for (i in 0 until tabLayout.tabCount) {
107→                    tabLayout.getTabAt(i)?.view?.isEnabled = uiState.isTabBarEnabled
108→                    tabLayout.getTabAt(i)?.view?.isClickable = uiState.isTabBarEnabled
109→                    if (uiState.isTabBarEnabled) {
110→                        tabLayout.getTabAt(i)?.view?.alpha = 1F
111→                    } else {
112→                        tabLayout.getTabAt(i)?.view?.alpha = disabledTabsOpacity
113→                    }
114→                }
115→            }
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
120→        if (item.itemId == AndroidR.id.home) {
121→            onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed()
122→            return true
123→        }
124→        return super.onOptionsItemSelected(item)
125→    }
126→
127→    companion object {
128→        private const val VIEW_PAGER_OFFSCREEN_PAGE_LIMIT = 1
129→    }
130→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified
  2→
  3→import android.os.Bundle
  4→import android.view.View
  5→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
  6→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog.Builder
  7→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
  8→import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
  9→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
 10→import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
 11→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager
 12→import com.google.android.material.dialog.MaterialAlertDialogBuilder
 13→import com.google.android.material.snackbar.Snackbar
 14→import org.wordpress.android.R
 15→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 16→import org.wordpress.android.databinding.UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.CommentStatus
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentDetailsActivityContract.CommentDetailsActivityRequest
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentDetailsActivityContract.CommentDetailsActivityResponse
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentListUiModelHelper.ActionModeUiModel
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentListUiModelHelper.CommentList
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentListUiModelHelper.CommentsListUiModel
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentListUiModelHelper.CommentsListUiModel.WithData
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentListUiModelHelper.ConfirmationDialogUiModel
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentListUiModelHelper.ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Visible
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.SelectedSiteRepository
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.SnackbarItem
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.SnackbarItem.Action
 32→import org.wordpress.android.util.SnackbarItem.Info
 33→import org.wordpress.android.util.SnackbarSequencer
 34→import org.wordpress.android.util.WPSwipeToRefreshHelper
 35→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.UnifiedCommentsDetailFeatureConfig
 36→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
 37→import org.wordpress.android.util.helpers.SwipeToRefreshHelper
 38→import javax.inject.Inject
 39→
 40→class UnifiedCommentListFragment : Fragment(R.layout.unified_comment_list_fragment) {
 41→    @Inject
 42→    lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 43→
 44→    @Inject
 45→    lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 46→
 47→    @Inject
 48→    lateinit var snackbarSequencer: SnackbarSequencer
 49→
 50→    @Inject
 51→    lateinit var selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository
 52→
 53→    @Inject
 54→    lateinit var networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 55→
 56→    @Inject
 57→    lateinit var unifiedCommentsDetailFeatureConfig: UnifiedCommentsDetailFeatureConfig
 58→
 59→    private lateinit var viewModel: UnifiedCommentListViewModel
 60→    private lateinit var activityViewModel: UnifiedCommentActivityViewModel
 61→    private lateinit var adapter: UnifiedCommentListAdapter
 62→    private lateinit var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper
 63→
 64→    private lateinit var commentListFilter: CommentFilter
 65→
 66→    var confirmationDialog: AlertDialog? = null
 67→    var currentSnackbar: Snackbar? = null
 68→
 69→    private var binding: UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding? = null
 70→
 71→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 72→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 73→        (requireActivity().application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 74→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[UnifiedCommentListViewModel::class.java]
 75→        activityViewModel = ViewModelProvider(
 76→            requireActivity(),
 77→            viewModelFactory
 78→        )[UnifiedCommentActivityViewModel::class.java]
 79→        arguments?.let {
 80→            commentListFilter = requireNotNull(it.getSerializableCompat<CommentFilter>(KEY_COMMENT_LIST_FILTER))
 81→        }
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 85→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 86→        binding = UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding.bind(view).apply {
 87→            setupContentViews()
 88→            setupObservers()
 89→        }
 90→    }
 91→
 92→    private fun UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding.setupContentViews() {
 93→        val layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
 94→        commentsRecyclerView.layoutManager = layoutManager
 95→        commentsRecyclerView.addItemDecoration(UnifiedCommentListItemDecoration(commentsRecyclerView.context))
 96→
 97→        adapter = UnifiedCommentListAdapter(requireContext())
 98→        commentsRecyclerView.adapter = adapter
 99→
100→        swipeToRefreshHelper = WPSwipeToRefreshHelper.buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(ptrLayout) {
101→            viewModel.reload()
102→            if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
103→                ptrLayout.isRefreshing = false
104→            }
105→        }
106→    }
107→
108→    private fun UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding.setupObservers() {
109→        var isShowingActionMode = false
110→        @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
111→        viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launchWhenStarted {
112→            viewModel.uiState.collect { uiState ->
113→                setupCommentsList(uiState.commentsListUiModel)
114→                setupConfirmationDialog(uiState.confirmationDialogUiModel)
115→                setupCommentsAdapter(uiState.commentData, uiState.commentsListUiModel)
116→                if (uiState.actionModeUiModel is ActionModeUiModel.Visible && !isShowingActionMode) {
117→                    isShowingActionMode = true
118→                    (activity as AppCompatActivity).startSupportActionMode(
119→                        CommentListActionModeCallback(
120→                            viewModel,
121→                            activityViewModel
122→                        )
123→                    )
124→                } else if (uiState.actionModeUiModel is ActionModeUiModel.Hidden && isShowingActionMode) {
125→                    isShowingActionMode = false
126→                }
127→            }
128→        }
129→
130→        @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
131→        viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launchWhenStarted {
132→            viewModel.onSnackbarMessage.collect { snackbarMessage ->
133→                snackbarSequencer.enqueue(
134→                    SnackbarItem(
135→                        Info(
136→                            view = coordinator,
137→                            textRes = snackbarMessage.message,
138→                            duration = Snackbar.LENGTH_LONG
139→                        ),
140→                        snackbarMessage.buttonTitle?.let {
141→                            Action(
142→                                textRes = snackbarMessage.buttonTitle,
143→                                clickListener = { snackbarMessage.buttonAction() }
144→                            )
145→                        },
146→                        dismissCallback = { _, event ->
147→                            currentSnackbar = null
148→                            snackbarMessage.onDismissAction(event)
149→                        },
150→                        showCallback = { snackbar -> currentSnackbar = snackbar }
151→                    )
152→                )
153→            }
154→        }
155→
156→        @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
157→        viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launchWhenStarted {
158→            viewModel.onCommentDetailsRequested.collect { selectedComment ->
159→                showCommentDetails(selectedComment.remoteCommentId, selectedComment.status)
160→            }
161→        }
162→
163→        viewModel.start(commentListFilter)
164→    }
165→
166→    private fun showCommentDetails(commentId: Long, commentStatus: CommentStatus) {
167→        currentSnackbar?.dismiss()
168→        if (unifiedCommentsDetailFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
169→            ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedCommentsDetails(context, selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite())
170→        } else {
171→            commentDetails.launch(
172→                CommentDetailsActivityRequest(
173→                    commentId,
174→                    commentStatus,
175→                    selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!
176→                )
177→            )
178→        }
179→    }
180→
181→    val commentDetails = registerForActivityResult(
182→        CommentDetailsActivityContract()
183→    ) { response: CommentDetailsActivityResponse? ->
184→        if (response != null) {
185→            viewModel.performSingleCommentModeration(response.commentId, response.commentStatus)
186→        }
187→    }
188→
189→    private fun UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding.setupCommentsAdapter(
190→        commentList: CommentList,
191→        listUiModel: CommentsListUiModel
192→    ) {
193→        if (listUiModel is WithData || listUiModel is CommentsListUiModel.Empty) {
194→            val recyclerViewState = commentsRecyclerView.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
195→            commentsRecyclerView.post {
196→                adapter.submitList(commentList.comments)
197→                commentsRecyclerView.post {
198→                    (commentsRecyclerView.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
199→                        if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() <
200→                            MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION
201→                        ) {
202→                            layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
203→                        }
204→                    }
205→                }
206→            }
207→        }
208→    }
209→
210→    private fun UnifiedCommentListFragmentBinding.setupCommentsList(uiModel: CommentsListUiModel) {
211→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(loadingView, uiModel == CommentsListUiModel.Loading)
212→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(actionableEmptyView, uiModel is CommentsListUiModel.Empty)
213→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(
214→            commentsRecyclerView, uiModel is WithData || uiModel is CommentsListUiModel.Refreshing
215→        )
216→        ptrLayout.isRefreshing = uiModel is CommentsListUiModel.Refreshing
217→
218→        when (uiModel) {
219→            is CommentsListUiModel.Empty -> {
220→                if (uiModel.image != null) {
221→                    actionableEmptyView.image.visibility = View.VISIBLE
222→                    actionableEmptyView.image.setImageResource(uiModel.image)
223→                } else {
224→                    actionableEmptyView.image.visibility = View.GONE
225→                }
226→
227→                actionableEmptyView.title.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(
228→                    requireContext(),
229→                    uiModel.title
230→                )
231→            }
232→
233→            else -> { // noop
234→            }
235→        }
236→    }
237→
238→    private fun setupConfirmationDialog(uiModel: ConfirmationDialogUiModel) {
239→        if (uiModel is Visible) {
240→            val dialogBuilder: Builder = MaterialAlertDialogBuilder(requireContext())
241→            dialogBuilder.setTitle(uiModel.title)
242→            dialogBuilder.setMessage(uiModel.message)
243→            dialogBuilder.setPositiveButton(uiModel.positiveButton) { _, _ -> uiModel.confirmAction.invoke() }
244→            dialogBuilder.setNegativeButton(uiModel.negativeButton) { _, _ -> uiModel.cancelAction.invoke() }
245→            dialogBuilder.setCancelable(true)
246→            dialogBuilder.setOnCancelListener { uiModel.cancelAction.invoke() }
247→            confirmationDialog = dialogBuilder.create()
248→            confirmationDialog!!.show()
249→        } else {
250→            confirmationDialog?.dismiss()
251→        }
252→    }
253→
254→    override fun onDestroyView() {
255→        super.onDestroyView()
256→        binding = null
257→        confirmationDialog?.dismiss()
258→    }
259→
260→    companion object {
261→        private const val KEY_COMMENT_LIST_FILTER = "KEY_COMMENT_LIST_FILTER"
262→        private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 4
263→
264→        fun newInstance(filter: CommentFilter) = UnifiedCommentListFragment().apply {
265→            arguments = Bundle().apply {
266→                putSerializable(KEY_COMMENT_LIST_FILTER, filter)
267→            }
268→        }
269→    }
270→}
271→

1→package org.wordpress.android.models.usecases
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableSharedFlow
  5→import org.wordpress.android.R
  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.CommentError
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.CommentErrorType.GENERIC_ERROR
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentsStore.CommentsActionPayload
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentsStore.CommentsData.PagingData
 11→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.CommentsUseCaseType.PAGINATE_USE_CASE
 12→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.PaginateCommentsAction
 13→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.PaginateCommentsAction.OnGetPage
 14→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.PaginateCommentsAction.OnReloadFromCache
 15→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.PaginateCommentsState.Idle
 16→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.Parameters.GetPageParameters
 17→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.Parameters.ReloadFromCacheParameters
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentFilter
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentFilter.UNREPLIED
 20→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.FlowFSMUseCase
 21→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.UseCaseResult
 22→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.UseCaseResult.Failure
 23→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.UseCaseResult.Loading
 24→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.UseCaseResult.Success
 25→import javax.inject.Inject
 26→
 27→class PaginateCommentsUseCase @Inject constructor(
 28→    paginateCommentsResourceProvider: PaginateCommentsResourceProvider
 29→) : FlowFSMUseCase<PaginateCommentsResourceProvider, PaginateCommentsAction, PagingData,
 30→        CommentsUseCaseType, CommentError>(
 31→    resourceProvider = paginateCommentsResourceProvider,
 32→    initialState = Idle
 33→) {
 34→    @Suppress("LongMethod") // temporary suppress until we come up with better architecture for use cases
 35→    sealed class PaginateCommentsState : StateInterface<PaginateCommentsResourceProvider, PaginateCommentsAction,
 36→            PagingData, CommentsUseCaseType,
 37→            CommentError> {
 38→        object Idle : PaginateCommentsState() {
 39→            override suspend fun runAction(
 40→                utilsProvider: PaginateCommentsResourceProvider,
 41→                action: PaginateCommentsAction,
 42→                flowChannel: MutableSharedFlow<UseCaseResult<CommentsUseCaseType, CommentError, PagingData>>
 43→            ): StateInterface<PaginateCommentsResourceProvider, PaginateCommentsAction, PagingData, CommentsUseCaseType,
 44→                    CommentError> {
 45→                val unrepliedCommentsUtils = utilsProvider.unrepliedCommentsUtils
 46→                return when (action) {
 47→                    is OnGetPage -> {
 48→                        val parameters = action.parameters
 49→                        val commentsStore = utilsProvider.commentsStore
 50→                        if (parameters.offset == 0) {
 51→                            flowChannel.emit(Loading(PAGINATE_USE_CASE))
 52→                            delay(LOADING_STATE_DELAY)
 53→                        }
 54→                        val result = if (!utilsProvider.networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 55→                            val cachedComments = if (parameters.offset > 0) {
 56→                                commentsStore.getCommentsForSite(
 57→                                    site = parameters.site,
 58→                                    orderByDateAscending = false,
 59→                                    limit = parameters.offset,
 60→                                    statuses = parameters.commentFilter.toCommentCacheStatuses().toTypedArray()
 61→                                )
 62→                            } else {
 63→                                listOf()
 64→                            }
 65→                            CommentsActionPayload(
 66→                                CommentError(
 67→                                    GENERIC_ERROR,
 68→                                    utilsProvider.resourceProvider.getString(R.string.no_network_message)
 69→                                ), PagingData(
 70→                                    comments = cachedComments,
 71→                                    hasMore = cachedComments.isNotEmpty()
 72→                                )
 73→                            )
 74→                        } else {
 75→                            commentsStore.fetchCommentsPage(
 76→                                site = parameters.site,
 77→                                number = parameters.number,
 78→                                offset = parameters.offset,
 79→                                networkStatusFilter = parameters.commentFilter.toCommentStatus(),
 80→                                cacheStatuses = parameters.commentFilter.toCommentCacheStatuses()
 81→                            )
 82→                        }
 83→
 84→                        val data = (result.data ?: PagingData.empty()).let {
 85→                            if (parameters.commentFilter == UNREPLIED) {
 86→                                it.copy(comments = unrepliedCommentsUtils.getUnrepliedComments(it.comments))
 87→                            } else it
 88→                        }
 89→
 90→                        if (result.isError) {
 91→                            flowChannel.emit(Failure(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, result.error, data))
 92→                        } else {
 93→                            flowChannel.emit(Success(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, data))
 94→                        }
 95→
 96→                        Idle
 97→                    }
 98→                    is OnReloadFromCache -> {
 99→                        val parameters = action.parameters
100→                        val commentsStore = utilsProvider.commentsStore
101→
102→                        val result = commentsStore.getCachedComments(
103→                            site = parameters.pagingParameters.site,
104→                            cacheStatuses = parameters.pagingParameters.commentFilter.toCommentCacheStatuses(),
105→                            imposeHasMore = parameters.hasMore
106→                        )
107→
108→                        val data = (result.data ?: PagingData.empty()).let {
109→                            if (parameters.pagingParameters.commentFilter == UNREPLIED) {
110→                                it.copy(comments = unrepliedCommentsUtils.getUnrepliedComments(it.comments))
111→                            } else it
112→                        }
113→
114→                        if (result.isError) {
115→                            flowChannel.emit(Failure(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, result.error, data))
116→                        } else {
117→                            flowChannel.emit(Success(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, data))
118→                        }
119→
120→                        Idle
121→                    }
122→                }
123→            }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    sealed class PaginateCommentsAction {
128→        data class OnGetPage(
129→            val parameters: GetPageParameters
130→        ) : PaginateCommentsAction()
131→
132→        data class OnReloadFromCache(
133→            val parameters: ReloadFromCacheParameters
134→        ) : PaginateCommentsAction()
135→    }
136→
137→    sealed class Parameters {
138→        data class GetPageParameters(
139→            val site: SiteModel,
140→            val number: Int,
141→            val offset: Int,
142→            val commentFilter: CommentFilter
143→        ) : Parameters()
144→
145→        data class ReloadFromCacheParameters(
146→            val pagingParameters: GetPageParameters,
147→            val hasMore: Boolean
148→        ) : Parameters()
149→    }
150→
151→    companion object {
152→        const val LOADING_STATE_DELAY = 500L
153→    }
154→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.models.usecases
 2→
 3→import kotlinx.coroutines.ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
 4→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.merge
 5→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.BatchModerateCommentsUseCase.ModerateCommentsAction.OnModerateComments
 6→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.BatchModerateCommentsUseCase.Parameters.ModerateCommentsParameters
 7→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.ModerateCommentWithUndoUseCase.ModerateCommentsAction.OnModerateComment
 8→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.ModerateCommentWithUndoUseCase.ModerateCommentsAction.OnPushComment
 9→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.ModerateCommentWithUndoUseCase.ModerateCommentsAction.OnUndoModerateComment
10→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.ModerateCommentWithUndoUseCase.Parameters.ModerateCommentParameters
11→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.ModerateCommentWithUndoUseCase.Parameters.ModerateWithFallbackParameters
12→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.PaginateCommentsAction.OnGetPage
13→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.PaginateCommentsAction.OnReloadFromCache
14→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.Parameters.GetPageParameters
15→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.PaginateCommentsUseCase.Parameters.ReloadFromCacheParameters
16→import javax.inject.Inject
17→
18→class UnifiedCommentsListHandler @Inject constructor(
19→    private val paginateCommentsUseCase: PaginateCommentsUseCase,
20→    private val batchModerationUseCase: BatchModerateCommentsUseCase,
21→    private val moderationWithUndoUseCase: ModerateCommentWithUndoUseCase
22→) {
23→    private val useCases = listOf(paginateCommentsUseCase, batchModerationUseCase, moderationWithUndoUseCase)
24→
25→    @OptIn(ExperimentalCoroutinesApi::class)
26→    fun subscribe() = useCases.map { it.subscribe() }.merge()
27→
28→    suspend fun requestPage(parameters: GetPageParameters) = paginateCommentsUseCase.manageAction(
29→        OnGetPage(parameters)
30→    )
31→
32→    suspend fun moderateComments(parameters: ModerateCommentsParameters) = batchModerationUseCase.manageAction(
33→        OnModerateComments(parameters)
34→    )
35→
36→    suspend fun preModerateWithUndo(parameters: ModerateCommentParameters) = moderationWithUndoUseCase.manageAction(
37→        OnModerateComment(parameters)
38→    )
39→
40→    suspend fun moderateAfterUndo(parameters: ModerateWithFallbackParameters) = moderationWithUndoUseCase.manageAction(
41→        OnPushComment(parameters)
42→    )
43→
44→    suspend fun undoCommentModeration(parameters: ModerateWithFallbackParameters) =
45→        moderationWithUndoUseCase.manageAction(
46→            OnUndoModerateComment(parameters)
47→        )
48→
49→    suspend fun refreshFromCache(parameters: ReloadFromCacheParameters) = paginateCommentsUseCase.manageAction(
50→        OnReloadFromCache(parameters)
51→    )
52→}

189→    fun copyPost(site: SiteModel, postToCopy: PostModel, performChecks: Boolean = false) {
190→        if (performChecks && (postConflictResolver.doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict(postToCopy) ||
191→                    postConflictResolver.hasUnhandledAutoSave(postToCopy))

194→            return

196→        val post = postStore.instantiatePostModel(

200→            postToCopy.content,
201→            PostStatus.DRAFT.toString(),
202→            postToCopy.categoryIdList,
203→            postToCopy.postFormat,

210→     * Filtering by author is disable on:
211→     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
212→     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
213→     * which we currently can't
214→     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.
215→     *
216→     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso as of 11/4/2019.
217→     */
218→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
219→        site.isWPCom && site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts && !site.isSingleUserSite
220→    }
221→
222→    init {
223→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED
224→    }
225→
226→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
227→    fun start(
228→        site: SiteModel,
229→        initPreviewState: PostListRemotePreviewState,
230→        currentBottomSheetPostId: LocalId,
231→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
232→    ) {
233→        this.site = site
234→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
235→
236→        val authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection = if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
237→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection
238→        } else {
239→            AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
240→        }
241→
242→        postListEventListenerFactory.createAndStartListening(
243→            lifecycle = lifecycleOwner.lifecycle,
244→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
245→            bgDispatcher = bgDispatcher,
246→            postStore = postStore,
247→            site = site,
248→            postActionHandler = postActionHandler,
249→            handlePostUpdatedWithoutError = postConflictResolver::onPostSuccessfullyUpdated,
250→            handlePostUploadedWithoutError = {
251→                refreshAllLists()
252→            },
253→            triggerPostUploadAction = { _postUploadAction.postValue(it) },
254→            invalidateUploadStatus = {
255→                uploadStatusTracker.invalidateUploadStatus(it)
256→                invalidateAllLists()
257→            },
258→            invalidateFeaturedMedia = {
259→                featuredImageTracker.invalidateFeaturedMedia(it)
260→                invalidateAllLists()
261→            },
262→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate = this::updatePreviewAndDialogState,
263→            isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList = this::isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList,
264→            hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError = this::hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError
265→        )
266→
267→        _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
268→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
269→            isFabVisible = FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES.contains(POST_LIST_PAGES.first()) &&
270→                    isSearchExpanded.value != true,
271→            isAuthorFilterVisible = isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
272→            authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection,
273→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(authorFilterSelection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
274→        )
275→        _previewState.value = _previewState.value ?: initPreviewState
276→
277→        currentBottomSheetPostId.let { postId ->
278→            if (postId.value != 0) {
279→                editPostRepository.loadPostByLocalPostId(postId.value)
280→            }
281→        }
282→
283→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
284→
285→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(site)
286→
287→        editPostRepository.run {
288→            postChanged.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
289→                savePostToDbUseCase.savePostToDb(editPostRepository, site)
290→            })
291→        }
292→    }
293→
294→    override fun onCleared() {
295→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.DESTROYED
296→        scrollToTargetPostJob.cancel() // cancels all coroutines with the default coroutineContext
297→        super.onCleared()
298→    }
299→
300→    /*
301→     * FUTURE_REFACTOR: We shouldn't need to pass the AuthorFilterSelection to fragments and get it back, we have that
302→     * info already
303→     */
304→    fun getPostListViewModelConnector(
305→        postListType: PostListType
306→    ): PostListViewModelConnector {
307→        return PostListViewModelConnector(
308→            site = site,
309→            postListType = postListType,
310→            postActionHandler = postActionHandler,
311→            uploadStatusTracker = uploadStatusTracker,
312→            doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict = postConflictResolver::doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict,
313→            hasAutoSave = postConflictResolver::hasUnhandledAutoSave,
314→            postFetcher = postFetcher,
315→            getFeaturedImageUrl = featuredImageTracker::getFeaturedImageUrl
316→        )
317→    }
318→
319→    fun onSearchExpanded(restorePreviousSearch: Boolean) {
320→        if (isSearchExpanded.value != true) {
321→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(POST_LIST_SEARCH_ACCESSED, site)
322→
323→            if (!restorePreviousSearch) {
324→                clearSearch()
325→            }
326→
327→            _isSearchExpanded.value = true
328→            _viewState.value = _viewState.value?.copy(isFabVisible = false, isAuthorFilterVisible = false)
329→        }
330→    }
331→
332→    fun onSearchCollapsed(delay: Long = SEARCH_COLLAPSE_DELAY) {
333→        _isSearchExpanded.value = false
334→        clearSearch()
335→
336→        launch {
337→            delay(delay)
338→            withContext(mainDispatcher) {
339→                _viewState.value =
340→                    _viewState.value?.copy(isFabVisible = true, isAuthorFilterVisible = isFilteringByAuthorSupported)
341→            }
342→        }
343→    }
344→
345→    fun onSearch(searchQuery: String) {
346→        _searchQuery.value = searchQuery
347→    }
348→
349→    private fun clearSearch() {
350→        _searchQuery.value = null
351→    }
352→
353→    fun fabClicked() {
354→        analyticsTracker.track(POST_LIST_CREATE_POST_TAPPED,
355→            mapOf(TRACKS_ACTION to TRACKS_CREATE_NEW_POST )
356→        )
357→
358→        postActionHandler.newPost()
359→    }
360→
361→    fun updateAuthorFilterSelection(selectionId: Long) {
362→        val selection = AuthorFilterSelection.fromId(selectionId)
363→
364→        updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
365→            authorFilterSelection = selection,
366→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(selection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
367→        )
368→        if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
369→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection = selection
370→        }
371→    }
372→
373→    fun onTabChanged(position: Int) {
374→        val currentPage = POST_LIST_PAGES[position]
375→        updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(isFabVisible = FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES.contains(currentPage))
376→
377→        AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
378→            POST_LIST_TAB_CHANGED,
379→            site,
380→            mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_TAB to currentPage.toString() as Any)
381→        )
382→    }
383→
384→    fun showTargetPost(targetPostId: Int) {
385→        val postModel = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(targetPostId)
386→        if (postModel == null) {
387→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
388→        } else {
389→            launch(mainDispatcher) {
390→                val targetTab = PostListType.fromPostStatus(PostStatus.fromPost(postModel))
391→                _selectTab.value = POST_LIST_PAGES.indexOf(targetTab)
392→                // we need to make sure the ViewPager initializes the targetTab fragment before we can propagate
393→                // the targetPostId to it
394→                withContext(bgDispatcher) {
395→                    delay(SCROLL_TO_DELAY)
396→                }
397→                _scrollToLocalPostId.value = LocalPostId(LocalId(postModel.id))
398→            }
399→        }
400→    }
401→
402→    fun handleEditPostResult(data: Intent?) {
403→        postActionHandler.handleEditPostResult(data)
404→    }
405→
406→    private fun editRestoredAutoSavePost(localPostId: Int) {
407→        val post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(localPostId)
408→        if (post != null) {
409→            _postListAction.postValue(PostListAction.EditPost(site, post, loadAutoSaveRevision = true))
410→        } else {
411→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes((R.string.error_post_does_not_exist)))
412→        }
413→    }
414→
415→    private fun editLocalPost(localPostId: Int) {
416→        val post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(localPostId)
417→        if (post != null) {
418→            _postListAction.postValue(PostListAction.EditPost(site, post, loadAutoSaveRevision = false))
419→        } else {
420→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
421→        }
422→    }
423→
424→    private fun copyLocalPost(localPostId: Int) {
425→        val post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(localPostId)
426→        if (post != null) {
427→            copyPost(site, post)
428→        } else {
429→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
430→        }
431→    }
432→
433→    // BasicFragmentDialog Events
434→
435→    fun onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
436→        postListDialogHelper.onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(
437→            instanceTag = instanceTag,
438→            trashPostWithLocalChanges = postActionHandler::trashPostWithLocalChanges,
439→            trashPostWithUnsavedChanges = postActionHandler::trashPostWithUnsavedChanges,
440→            deletePost = postActionHandler::deletePost,
441→            publishPost = postActionHandler::publishPost,
442→            updateConflictedPostWithRemoteVersion = postConflictResolver::updateConflictedPostWithRemoteVersion,
443→            editRestoredAutoSavePost = this::editRestoredAutoSavePost,
444→            moveTrashedPostToDraft = postActionHandler::moveTrashedPostToDraft,
445→            resolveConflictsAndEditPost = postActionHandler::resolveConflictsAndEditPost
446→        )
447→    }
448→
449→    fun onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
450→        postListDialogHelper.onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(
451→            instanceTag = instanceTag,
452→            updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion = postConflictResolver::updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion,
453→            editLocalPost = this::editLocalPost,
454→            copyLocalPost = this::copyLocalPost
455→        )
456→    }
457→
458→    fun onDismissByOutsideTouchForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
459→        postListDialogHelper.onDismissByOutsideTouchForBasicDialog(
460→            instanceTag = instanceTag,
461→            updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion = postConflictResolver::updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion,
462→            editLocalPost = this::editLocalPost,
463→            copyLocalPost = this::copyLocalPost
464→        )
465→    }
466→
467→    private fun showPrepublishingBottomSheet(post: PostModel) {
468→        currentBottomSheetPostId = LocalId(post.id)
469→        editPostRepository.loadPostByLocalPostId(post.id)
470→        _openPrepublishingBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
471→    }
472→
473→    /**
474→     * Only the non-null variables will be changed in the current state
475→     */
476→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
477→    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
478→        isFabVisible: Boolean? = null,
479→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
480→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
481→        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
482→    ) {
483→        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
484→            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
485→        }
486→
487→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
488→            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
489→            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
490→            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
491→            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
492→        )
493→
494→        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
495→            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
496→
497→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
498→                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
499→                site,
500→                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
501→            )
502→        }
503→    }
504→
505→    private fun invalidateAllLists() {
506→        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
507→        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListDataInvalidatedAction(listTypeIdentifier))
508→    }
509→
510→    private fun refreshAllLists() {
511→        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
512→        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListRequiresRefreshAction(listTypeIdentifier))
513→    }
514→
515→    private fun isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList() = _previewState.value != null &&
516→            _previewState.value != PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE
517→
518→    private fun hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError() = _previewState.value != null &&
519→            _previewState.value == PostListRemotePreviewState.REMOTE_AUTO_SAVE_PREVIEW_ERROR
520→
521→    private fun checkNetworkConnection(): Boolean =
522→        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
523→            true
524→        } else {
525→            _toastMessage.postValue(ToastMessageHolder(R.string.no_network_message, Duration.SHORT))
526→            false
527→        }
528→
529→    fun handleRemotePreviewClosing() {
530→        updatePreviewAndDialogState(PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, PostInfoType.PostNoInfo)
531→    }
532→
533→    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
534→        // We need only transitions, so...
535→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
536→
537→        AppLog.d(
538→            AppLog.T.POSTS,
539→            "Posts list preview state machine: transition from ${_previewState.value} to $newState"
540→        )
541→
542→        // update the state
543→        val prevState = _previewState.value
544→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
545→
546→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
547→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
548→            newState,
549→            prevState,
550→            postInfo,
551→            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
552→        )
553→    }
554→
555→    fun onBottomSheetPublishButtonClicked() {
556→        editPostRepository.getEditablePost()?.let {
557→            postActionHandler.publishPost(it)
558→        }
559→    }
560→
561→    fun refreshUiStateForAuthorFilter() {
562→        _viewState.value = _viewState.value?.copy()
563→    }
564→}
