1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.os.Bundle
  4→import android.text.TextUtils
  5→import android.view.LayoutInflater
  6→import android.view.View
  7→import android.view.ViewGroup
  8→import android.widget.Button
  9→import android.widget.ProgressBar
 10→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 11→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
 12→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager
 13→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
 14→import org.wordpress.android.R
 15→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActionableEmptyView
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ViewPagerFragment
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListType.SEARCH
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.adapters.PostListAdapter
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 23→import org.wordpress.android.util.DisplayUtils
 24→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtils
 25→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 26→import org.wordpress.android.util.WPSwipeToRefreshHelper.buildSwipeToRefreshHelper
 27→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
 28→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.helpers.SwipeToRefreshHelper
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.widgets.CustomSwipeRefreshLayout
 32→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PagedPostList
 33→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListEmptyUiState
 34→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemIdentifier.LocalPostId
 35→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListViewModel
 36→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.RecyclerItemDecoration
 37→import javax.inject.Inject
 38→
 39→private const val EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE = "post_list_type"
 40→private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 2
 41→
 42→class PostListFragment : ViewPagerFragment() {
 43→    @Inject
 44→    internal lateinit var imageManager: ImageManager
 45→
 46→    @Inject
 47→    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 48→
 49→    @Inject
 50→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 51→    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListViewModel
 52→    private lateinit var mainViewModel: PostListMainViewModel
 53→
 54→    private var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper? = null
 55→
 56→    private var swipeRefreshLayout: CustomSwipeRefreshLayout? = null
 57→    private var recyclerView: RecyclerView? = null
 58→    private var actionableEmptyView: ActionableEmptyView? = null
 59→    private var progressLoadMore: ProgressBar? = null
 60→
 61→    private lateinit var itemDecorationStandardLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 62→
 63→    private lateinit var postListType: PostListType
 64→
 65→    private lateinit var nonNullActivity: FragmentActivity
 66→
 67→    private val postListAdapter: PostListAdapter by lazy {
 68→        PostListAdapter(
 69→            context = nonNullActivity,
 70→            imageManager = imageManager,
 71→            uiHelpers = uiHelpers
 72→        )
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 76→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 77→        nonNullActivity = requireActivity()
 78→        (nonNullActivity.application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 79→
 80→        val nonNullIntent = checkNotNull(nonNullActivity.intent)
 81→        val site = nonNullIntent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE)
 82→
 83→        if (site == null) {
 84→            ToastUtils.showToast(nonNullActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 85→            nonNullActivity.finish()
 86→        }
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun getScrollableViewForUniqueIdProvision(): View? {
 90→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 91→            return null
 92→        }
 93→        return recyclerView
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 97→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 98→        postListType = requireNotNull(arguments?.getSerializableCompat(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE))
 99→
100→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
101→            recyclerView?.id = R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id
102→        }
103→
104→        mainViewModel = ViewModelProvider(nonNullActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
105→
106→        mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
107→            if (it != null) {
108→                if (viewModel.updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(it)) {
109→                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
110→                }
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→        actionableEmptyView?.updateLayoutForSearch(postListType == SEARCH, 0)
115→
116→        val postListViewModelConnector = mainViewModel.getPostListViewModelConnector(postListType)
117→
118→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[PostListViewModel::class.java]
119→
120→        val displayWidth = DisplayUtils.getWindowPixelWidth(requireContext())
121→        val contentSpacing = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.content_margin)
122→
123→        // since the MainViewModel has been already started, we need to manually update the authorFilterSelection value
124→        viewModel.start(
125→            postListViewModelConnector,
126→            mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.value!!,
127→            photonWidth = displayWidth - contentSpacing * 2,
128→            photonHeight = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.reader_featured_image_height)
129→        )
130→
131→        initObservers()
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun initObservers() {
135→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
136→            mainViewModel.searchQuery.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
137→                if (TextUtils.isEmpty(it)) {
138→                    postListAdapter.submitList(null)
139→                }
140→                viewModel.search(it)
141→            }
142→        }
143→
144→        viewModel.emptyViewState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
145→            it?.let { emptyViewState -> updateEmptyViewForState(emptyViewState) }
146→        }
147→
148→        viewModel.isFetchingFirstPage.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
149→            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
150→        }
151→
152→        viewModel.pagedListData.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
153→            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
154→        }
155→
156→        viewModel.isLoadingMore.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
157→            progressLoadMore?.visibility = if (it == true) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
158→        }
159→        viewModel.scrollToPosition.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
160→            it?.let { index ->
161→                recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(index)
162→            }
163→        }
164→    }
165→
166→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
167→        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
168→
169→        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
170→        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
171→        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
172→        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
173→
174→        val context = nonNullActivity
175→        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
176→            0,
177→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
178→        )
179→        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
180→        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
181→        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
182→
183→        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
184→            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
185→                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
186→                    it.isRefreshing = false
187→                } else {
188→                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
189→                }
190→            }
191→        }
192→        return view
193→    }
194→
195→    /**
196→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
197→     *
198→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
199→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
200→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
201→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
202→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
203→     *
204→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
205→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
206→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
207→     * after changes are reflected.
208→     */
209→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
210→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
211→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
212→        recyclerView?.post {
213→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
214→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
215→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
216→                }
217→            }
218→        }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
222→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
223→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
224→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
225→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
226→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
227→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
228→            } else {
229→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
230→            }
231→        }
232→    }
233→
234→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
235→        buttonView: Button,
236→        text: UiString?,
237→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
238→    ) {
239→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
240→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
241→    }
242→
243→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
244→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
245→    }
246→
247→    companion object {
248→        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
249→
250→        @JvmStatic
251→        fun newInstance(
252→            site: SiteModel,
253→            postListType: PostListType
254→        ): PostListFragment {
255→            val fragment = PostListFragment()
256→            val bundle = Bundle()
257→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
258→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
259→            fragment.arguments = bundle
260→            return fragment
261→        }
262→    }
263→}

 70→
 71→const val EXTRA_TARGET_POST_LOCAL_ID = "targetPostLocalId"
 72→const val STATE_KEY_PREVIEW_STATE = "stateKeyPreviewState"
 73→const val STATE_KEY_BOTTOMSHEET_POST_ID = "stateKeyBottomSheetPostId"
 74→
 75→class PostsListActivity : LocaleAwareActivity(),
 76→    EditPostActivityHook,
 77→    PrepublishingBottomSheetListener,
 78→    BasicDialogPositiveClickInterface,
 79→    BasicDialogNegativeClickInterface,
 80→    BasicDialogOnDismissByOutsideTouchInterface,
 81→    ScrollableViewInitializedListener {
 82→    @Inject
 83→    internal lateinit var siteStore: SiteStore
 84→
 85→    @Inject
 86→    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 87→
 88→    @Inject
 89→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 90→
 91→    @Inject
 92→    internal lateinit var remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper
 93→
 94→    @Inject
 95→    internal lateinit var previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper
 96→
 97→    @Inject
 98→    internal lateinit var progressDialogHelper: ProgressDialogHelper
 99→
100→    @Inject
101→    internal lateinit var dispatcher: Dispatcher
102→
103→    @Inject
104→    internal lateinit var uploadActionUseCase: UploadActionUseCase
105→
106→    @Inject
107→    internal lateinit var snackbarSequencer: SnackbarSequencer
108→
109→    @Inject
110→    internal lateinit var uploadUtilsWrapper: UploadUtilsWrapper
111→
112→    @Inject
113→    internal lateinit var systemNotificationTracker: SystemNotificationsTracker
114→
115→    @Inject
116→    internal lateinit var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
117→
118→    @Inject
119→    internal lateinit var mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher
120→
121→    @Inject
122→    internal lateinit var storiesMediaPickerResultHandler: StoriesMediaPickerResultHandler
123→
124→    @Inject
125→    internal lateinit var bloggingRemindersViewModel: BloggingRemindersViewModel
126→
127→    @Inject
128→    internal lateinit var blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
129→
130→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
131→    private lateinit var binding: PostListActivityBinding
132→
133→    override fun getSite() = site
134→    override fun getEditPostRepository() = editPostRepository
135→
136→    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListMainViewModel
137→
138→    private lateinit var postsPagerAdapter: PostsPagerAdapter
139→    private lateinit var searchActionButton: MenuItem
140→    private lateinit var authorFilterMenuItem: MenuItem
141→    private lateinit var authorFilterSpinner: Spinner
142→
143→    private var restorePreviousSearch = false
144→
145→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
146→    private var progressDialog: ProgressDialog? = null
147→
148→    private var onPageChangeListener: OnPageChangeListener = object : OnPageChangeListener {
149→        override fun onPageScrolled(position: Int, positionOffset: Float, positionOffsetPixels: Int) {}
150→
151→        override fun onPageSelected(position: Int) {
152→            viewModel.onTabChanged(position)
153→        }
154→
155→        override fun onPageScrollStateChanged(state: Int) {}
156→    }
157→
158→    override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
159→        super.onNewIntent(intent)
160→        if (!intent.hasExtra(WordPress.SITE)) {
161→            AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, "PostListActivity started without a site.")
162→            finish()
163→            return
164→        }
165→        restartWhenSiteHasChanged(intent)
166→        loadIntentData(intent)
167→    }
168→
169→    private fun restartWhenSiteHasChanged(intent: Intent) {
170→        val site = requireNotNull(intent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE))
171→        if (site.id != this.site.id) {
172→            finish()
173→            startActivity(intent)
174→            return
175→        }
176→    }
177→
178→    public override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
179→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
180→        (application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
181→        with(PostListActivityBinding.inflate(layoutInflater)) {
182→            setContentView(root)
183→            binding = this
184→
185→            site = requireNotNull(
186→                if (savedInstanceState == null) {
187→                    intent.getSerializableExtraCompat(WordPress.SITE)
188→                } else {
189→                    restorePreviousSearch = true
190→                    savedInstanceState.getSerializableCompat(WordPress.SITE)
191→                }
192→            ) { "SiteModel cannot be null, check the PendingIntent starting PostsListActivity" }
193→
194→            val initPreviewState = if (savedInstanceState == null) {
195→                PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE
196→            } else {
197→                PostListRemotePreviewState.fromInt(savedInstanceState.getInt(STATE_KEY_PREVIEW_STATE, 0))
198→            }
199→
200→            val currentBottomSheetPostId = if (savedInstanceState == null) {
201→                LocalId(0)
202→            } else {
203→                LocalId(savedInstanceState.getInt(STATE_KEY_BOTTOMSHEET_POST_ID, 0))
204→            }
205→
206→            val tabIndex = intent.getIntExtra(TAB_INDEX, PostListType.PUBLISHED.ordinal)
207→
208→            setupActionBar()
209→            setupContent()
210→            initViewModel(initPreviewState, currentBottomSheetPostId)
211→            initBloggingReminders()
212→            initTabLayout(tabIndex)
213→            loadIntentData(intent)
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun setupActionBar() {
218→        val toolbar = findViewById<Toolbar>(R.id.toolbar)
219→        setSupportActionBar(toolbar)
220→
221→        title = getString(R.string.my_site_btn_blog_posts)
222→        supportActionBar?.setDisplayShowTitleEnabled(true)
223→        supportActionBar?.setDisplayHomeAsUpEnabled(true)
224→    }
225→
226→    private fun PostListActivityBinding.setupContent() {
227→        // Just a safety measure - there shouldn't by any existing listeners since this method is called just once.
228→        postPager.clearOnPageChangeListeners()
229→
230→        // this method call needs to be below `clearOnPageChangeListeners` as it internally adds an OnPageChangeListener
231→        tabLayout.setupWithViewPager(postPager)
232→        postPager.addOnPageChangeListener(onPageChangeListener)
233→        fabButton.setOnClickListener {
234→            viewModel.fabClicked()
235→        }
236→
237→        fabButton.setOnLongClickListener {
238→            if (fabButton.isHapticFeedbackEnabled) {
239→                fabButton.performHapticFeedback(HapticFeedbackConstants.LONG_PRESS)
240→            }
241→
242→            Toast.makeText(fabButton.context, R.string.create_post_fab_tooltip, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
243→            return@setOnLongClickListener true
244→        }
245→
246→        fabButton.redirectContextClickToLongPressListener()
247→
248→        postsPagerAdapter = PostsPagerAdapter(POST_LIST_PAGES, site, supportFragmentManager)
249→        postPager.adapter = postsPagerAdapter
250→    }
251→
252→    private fun PostListActivityBinding.initTabLayout(tabIndex: Int) {
253→       // Notification opens in Drafts tab
254→        tabLayout.getTabAt(tabIndex)?.select()
255→    }
256→
257→    private fun PostListActivityBinding.initViewModel(
258→        initPreviewState: PostListRemotePreviewState,
259→        currentBottomSheetPostId: LocalId
260→    ) {
261→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this@PostsListActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
262→        viewModel.start(site, initPreviewState, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
263→
264→        viewModel.viewState.observe(this@PostsListActivity) { state ->
265→            state?.let {
266→                loadViewState(state)
267→            }
268→        }
269→
270→        viewModel.postListAction.observe(this@PostsListActivity) { postListAction ->
271→            postListAction?.let { action ->
272→                handlePostListAction(
273→                    this@PostsListActivity,
274→                    action,
275→                    remotePreviewLogicHelper,
276→                    previewStateHelper,
277→                    mediaPickerLauncher,
278→                    blazeFeatureUtils
279→                )
280→            }
281→        }
282→        viewModel.selectTab.observe(this@PostsListActivity) { tabIndex ->
283→            tabIndex?.let {
284→                tabLayout.getTabAt(tabIndex)?.select()
285→            }
286→        }
287→        viewModel.scrollToLocalPostId.observe(this@PostsListActivity) { targetLocalPostId ->
288→            targetLocalPostId?.let {
289→                postsPagerAdapter.getItemAtPosition(postPager.currentItem)?.scrollToTargetPost(targetLocalPostId)
290→            }
291→        }
292→        viewModel.snackBarMessage.observe(this@PostsListActivity) {
293→            it?.let { snackBarHolder -> showSnackBar(snackBarHolder) }
294→        }
295→        viewModel.toastMessage.observe(this@PostsListActivity) {
296→            it?.show(this@PostsListActivity)
297→        }
298→        viewModel.previewState.observe(this@PostsListActivity) {
299→            progressDialog = progressDialogHelper.updateProgressDialogState(
300→                this@PostsListActivity,
301→                progressDialog,
302→                it.progressDialogUiState,
303→                uiHelpers
304→            )
305→        }
306→        setupActions()
307→        viewModel.openPrepublishingBottomSheet.observeEvent(this@PostsListActivity) {
308→            val fragment = supportFragmentManager.findFragmentByTag(PrepublishingBottomSheetFragment.TAG)
309→            if (fragment == null) {
310→                val prepublishingFragment = newInstance(
311→                    site = site,
312→                    isPage = editPostRepository.isPage,
313→                    isStoryPost = false
314→                )
315→                prepublishingFragment.show(supportFragmentManager, PrepublishingBottomSheetFragment.TAG)
316→            }
317→        }
318→    }
319→
320→    private fun initBloggingReminders() {
321→        bloggingRemindersViewModel = ViewModelProvider(
322→            this,
323→            viewModelFactory
324→        )[BloggingRemindersViewModel::class.java]
325→
326→        observeBottomSheet(
327→            bloggingRemindersViewModel.isBottomSheetShowing,
328→            this,
329→            BLOGGING_REMINDERS_FRAGMENT_TAG
330→        ) {
331→            if (!this.isFinishing) {
332→                this.supportFragmentManager
333→            } else {
334→                null
335→            }
336→        }
337→    }
338→
339→    private fun setupActions() {
340→        viewModel.dialogAction.observe(this@PostsListActivity) {
341→            it?.show(this@PostsListActivity, supportFragmentManager, uiHelpers)
342→        }
343→        viewModel.postUploadAction.observe(this@PostsListActivity) {
344→            it?.let { uploadAction ->
345→                handleUploadAction(
346→                    uploadAction,
347→                    this@PostsListActivity,
348→                    findViewById(R.id.coordinator),
349→                    uploadActionUseCase,
350→                    uploadUtilsWrapper
351→                ) { isFirstTimePublishing ->
352→                    bloggingRemindersViewModel.onPublishingPost(site.id, isFirstTimePublishing)
353→                }
354→            }
355→        }
356→    }
357→
358→    private fun PostListActivityBinding.loadViewState(state: PostListMainViewState) {
359→        if (state.isFabVisible) {
360→            fabButton.show()
361→        } else {
362→            fabButton.hide()
363→        }
364→
365→        // The author selection is in the toolbar, which doesn't get initialized until
366→        // after loadViewState is invoked. After the toolbar is initialized, the state is
367→        // updated and the adapter can be set properly. The visibility of the author filter
368→        // is handled in the viewModel itself
369→        if (::authorFilterMenuItem.isInitialized && ::authorFilterSpinner.isInitialized) {
370→            authorFilterMenuItem.isVisible = state.isAuthorFilterVisible
371→
372→            val authorSelectionAdapter = authorFilterSpinner.adapter as AuthorSelectionAdapter
373→            authorSelectionAdapter.updateItems(state.authorFilterItems)
374→
375→            authorSelectionAdapter.getIndexOfSelection(state.authorFilterSelection)?.let { selectionIndex ->
376→                authorFilterSpinner.setSelection(selectionIndex)
377→            }
378→        }
379→    }
380→
381→    private fun showSnackBar(holder: SnackbarMessageHolder) {
382→        findViewById<View>(R.id.coordinator)?.let { parent ->
383→            snackbarSequencer.enqueue(
384→                SnackbarItem(
385→                    SnackbarItem.Info(
386→                        view = parent,
387→                        textRes = holder.message,
388→                        duration = Snackbar.LENGTH_LONG
389→                    ),
390→                    holder.buttonTitle?.let {
391→                        SnackbarItem.Action(
392→                            textRes = holder.buttonTitle,
393→                            clickListener = { holder.buttonAction() }
394→                        )
395→                    },
396→                    dismissCallback = { _, event -> holder.onDismissAction(event) }
397→                )
398→            )
399→        }
400→    }
401→
402→    private fun loadIntentData(intent: Intent) {
403→        if (intent.hasExtra(ARG_NOTIFICATION_TYPE)) {
404→            val notificationType = requireNotNull(
405→                intent.getSerializableExtraCompat<NotificationType>(ARG_NOTIFICATION_TYPE)
406→            )
407→            systemNotificationTracker.trackTappedNotification(notificationType)
408→        }
409→
410→        val targetPostId = intent.getIntExtra(EXTRA_TARGET_POST_LOCAL_ID, -1)
411→        if (targetPostId != -1) {
412→            viewModel.showTargetPost(targetPostId)
413→        }
414→    }
415→
416→    public override fun onResume() {
417→        super.onResume()
418→        ActivityId.trackLastActivity(ActivityId.POSTS)
419→    }
420→
421→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION", "OVERRIDE_DEPRECATION")
422→    override fun onActivityResult(requestCode: Int, resultCode: Int, data: Intent?) {
423→        super.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data)
424→
425→        when {
426→            requestCode == RequestCodes.EDIT_POST && resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK -> {
427→                if (data != null && EditPostActivity.checkToRestart(data)) {
428→                    ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(
429→                        data, this, site,
430→                        data.getIntExtra(EditPostActivity.EXTRA_POST_LOCAL_ID, 0)
431→                    )
432→
433→                    // a restart will happen so, no need to continue here
434→                    return
435→                }
436→
437→                viewModel.handleEditPostResult(data)
438→            }
439→
440→            requestCode == RequestCodes.REMOTE_PREVIEW_POST -> {
441→                viewModel.handleRemotePreviewClosing()
442→            }
443→
444→            requestCode == RequestCodes.PHOTO_PICKER &&
445→                    resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK &&
446→                    data != null -> {
447→                storiesMediaPickerResultHandler.handleMediaPickerResultForStories(
448→                    data,
449→                    this,
450→                    site,
451→                    STORY_FROM_POSTS_LIST
452→                )
453→            }
454→
455→            requestCode == RequestCodes.CREATE_STORY -> {
456→                val isNewStory = data?.getStringExtra(GutenbergEditorFragment.ARG_STORY_BLOCK_ID) == null
457→                bloggingRemindersViewModel.onPublishingPost(
458→                    site.id,
459→                    isNewStory
460→                )
461→            }
462→        }
463→    }
464→
465→    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
466→        if (item.itemId == AndroidR.id.home) {
467→            onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed()
468→            return true
469→        } else if (item.itemId == R.id.author_filter_menu_item) {
470→            return true
471→        }
472→        return super.onOptionsItemSelected(item)
473→    }
474→
475→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
476→        super.onCreateOptionsMenu(menu)
477→        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.posts_and_pages_list_menu, menu)
478→        authorFilterMenuItem = menu.findItem(R.id.author_filter_menu_item)
479→        searchActionButton = menu.findItem(R.id.toggle_search)
480→
481→        initSearchFragment()
482→        binding.initSearchView()
483→        initAuthorFilter(authorFilterMenuItem)
484→        return true
485→    }
486→
487→    @SuppressLint("CommitTransaction")
488→    private fun initSearchFragment() {
489→        val searchFragmentTag = "search_fragment"
490→
491→        var searchFragment = supportFragmentManager.findFragmentByTag(searchFragmentTag)
492→
493→        if (searchFragment == null) {
494→            searchFragment = PostListFragment.newInstance(site, SEARCH)
495→            supportFragmentManager
496→                .beginTransaction()
497→                .replace(R.id.search_container, searchFragment, searchFragmentTag)
498→                .commit()
499→        }
500→    }
501→
502→    private fun initAuthorFilter(menuItem: MenuItem) {
503→        // Get the action view (Spinner) from the menu item
504→        val actionView = menuItem.actionView
505→        if (actionView is Spinner) {
506→            authorFilterSpinner = actionView
507→            val authorSelectionAdapter = AuthorSelectionAdapter(this@PostsListActivity)
508→            authorFilterSpinner.adapter = authorSelectionAdapter
509→
510→            // Set a listener if needed
511→            authorFilterSpinner.onItemSelectedListener = object : AdapterView.OnItemSelectedListener {
512→                override fun onItemSelected(
513→                    parentView: AdapterView<*>?,
514→                    selectedItemView: View?,
515→                    position: Int,
516→                    id: Long
517→                ) {
518→                    viewModel.updateAuthorFilterSelection(id)
519→                }
520→
521→                override fun onNothingSelected(parentView: AdapterView<*>?) {
522→                    // Do nothing here
523→                }
524→            }
525→            viewModel.refreshUiStateForAuthorFilter()
526→        }
527→    }
528→    private fun PostListActivityBinding.initSearchView() {
529→        searchActionButton.setOnActionExpandListener(object : OnActionExpandListener {
530→            override fun onMenuItemActionExpand(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
531→                viewModel.onSearchExpanded(restorePreviousSearch)
532→                return true
533→            }
534→
535→            override fun onMenuItemActionCollapse(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
536→                viewModel.onSearchCollapsed()
537→                return true
538→            }
539→        })
540→
541→        val searchView = searchActionButton.actionView as SearchView
542→        searchView.setOnQueryTextListener(object : SearchView.OnQueryTextListener {
543→            override fun onQueryTextSubmit(query: String): Boolean {
544→                viewModel.onSearch(query)
545→                return true
546→            }
547→
548→            override fun onQueryTextChange(newText: String): Boolean {
549→                if (restorePreviousSearch) {
550→                    restorePreviousSearch = false
551→                    searchView.setQuery(viewModel.searchQuery.value, false)
552→                } else {
553→                    viewModel.onSearch(newText)
554→                }
555→                return true
556→            }
557→        })
558→
559→        viewModel.isSearchExpanded.observe(this@PostsListActivity) { isExpanded ->
560→            authorFilterMenuItem.isVisible = !isExpanded
561→            toggleSearch(isExpanded)
562→        }
563→    }
564→
565→    private fun PostListActivityBinding.toggleSearch(isExpanded: Boolean) {
566→        val tabContainer = findViewById<View>(R.id.tabContainer)
567→        val searchContainer = findViewById<View>(R.id.search_container)
568→
569→        if (isExpanded) {
570→            postPager.visibility = View.GONE
571→            tabContainer.visibility = View.GONE
572→            searchContainer.visibility = View.VISIBLE
573→            if (!searchActionButton.isActionViewExpanded) {
574→                searchActionButton.expandActionView()
575→            }
576→            appbarMain.setLiftOnScrollTargetViewIdAndRequestLayout(R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id)
577→        } else {
578→            postPager.visibility = View.VISIBLE
579→            tabContainer.visibility = View.VISIBLE
580→            searchContainer.visibility = View.GONE
581→            if (searchActionButton.isActionViewExpanded) {
582→                searchActionButton.collapseActionView()
583→            }
584→            appbarMain.getTag(R.id.posts_non_search_recycler_view_id_tag_key)?.let {
585→                appbarMain.setLiftOnScrollTargetViewIdAndRequestLayout(it as Int)
586→            }
587→        }
588→    }
589→
590→    public override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
591→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
592→        outState.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
593→        viewModel.previewState.value?.let {
594→            outState.putInt(STATE_KEY_PREVIEW_STATE, it.value)
595→        }
596→        viewModel.currentBottomSheetPostId?.let {
597→            outState.putInt(STATE_KEY_BOTTOMSHEET_POST_ID, it.value)
598→        }
599→    }
600→
601→    // BasicDialogFragment Callbacks
602→
603→    override fun onPositiveClicked(instanceTag: String) {
604→        viewModel.onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag)
605→    }
606→
607→    override fun onNegativeClicked(instanceTag: String) {
608→        viewModel.onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag)
609→    }
610→
611→    override fun onDismissByOutsideTouch(instanceTag: String) {
612→        viewModel.onDismissByOutsideTouchForBasicDialog(instanceTag)
613→    }
614→
615→    override fun onSubmitButtonClicked(publishPost: PublishPost) {
616→        viewModel.onBottomSheetPublishButtonClicked()
617→    }
618→
619→    override fun onScrollableViewInitialized(containerId: Int) {
620→        binding.appbarMain.setLiftOnScrollTargetViewIdAndRequestLayout(containerId)
621→        binding.appbarMain.setTag(R.id.posts_non_search_recycler_view_id_tag_key, containerId)
622→    }
623→
624→    companion object {
625→        private const val BLOGGING_REMINDERS_FRAGMENT_TAG = "blogging_reminders_fragment_tag"
626→        private const val ACTIONS_SHOWN_BY_DEFAULT = "actions_shown_by_default"
627→        private const val TAB_INDEX = "tab_index"
628→
629→        @JvmStatic
630→        fun buildIntent(context: Context, site: SiteModel): Intent {
631→            val intent = Intent(context, PostsListActivity::class.java)
632→            intent.putExtra(WordPress.SITE, site)
633→            return buildIntent(context, site, PostListType.PUBLISHED, false)
634→        }
635→
636→        @JvmStatic
637→        fun buildIntent(
638→            context: Context,
639→            site: SiteModel,
640→            postListType: PostListType,
641→            actionsShownByDefault: Boolean,
642→            notificationType: NotificationType? = null
643→        ): Intent {
644→            val intent = Intent(context, PostsListActivity::class.java)
645→            intent.putExtra(WordPress.SITE, site)
646→            intent.putExtra(ACTIONS_SHOWN_BY_DEFAULT, actionsShownByDefault)
647→            intent.putExtra(TAB_INDEX, postListType.ordinal)
648→            if (notificationType != null) {
649→                intent.putExtra(ARG_NOTIFICATION_TYPE, notificationType)
650→            }
651→            return intent
652→        }
653→    }
654→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import android.graphics.drawable.Drawable
  5→import android.text.Spannable
  6→import android.text.SpannableString
  7→import android.text.style.ForegroundColorSpan
  8→import android.view.LayoutInflater
  9→import android.view.Menu
 10→import android.view.MenuItem
 11→import android.view.View
 12→import android.view.ViewGroup
 13→import android.view.ViewTreeObserver
 14→import android.widget.FrameLayout
 15→import android.widget.ImageView
 16→import android.widget.ProgressBar
 17→import android.widget.TextView
 18→import androidx.annotation.ColorRes
 19→import androidx.annotation.LayoutRes
 20→import androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
 21→import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
 22→import androidx.core.graphics.drawable.DrawableCompat
 23→import androidx.core.view.GravityCompat
 24→import androidx.core.view.MenuCompat
 25→import androidx.appcompat.widget.PopupMenu as AppCompatPopupMenu
 26→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
 27→import org.wordpress.android.R
 28→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiDimen
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 32→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.expandTouchTargetArea
 33→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getColorFromAttribute
 34→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getDrawableFromAttribute
 35→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 36→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageType
 37→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemAction
 38→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemType.PostListItemUiState
 39→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemUiStateData
 40→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.uistate.ProgressBarUiState
 41→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 42→import android.R as AndroidR
 43→import com.google.android.material.R as MaterialR
 44→
 45→const val MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES = 2
 46→
 47→sealed class PostListItemViewHolder(
 48→    @LayoutRes layout: Int,
 49→    parent: ViewGroup,
 50→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
 51→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 52→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 53→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 54→    private val titleTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 55→    private val postInfoTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)
 56→    private val statusesTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.statuses_label)
 57→    private val uploadProgressBar: ProgressBar = itemView.findViewById(R.id.upload_progress)
 58→    private val disabledOverlay: FrameLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.disabled_overlay)
 59→    private val container: ConstraintLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.container)
 60→    private val excerptTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.excerpt)
 61→    private val moreButton: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.more)
 62→
 63→    private val selectableBackground: Drawable? = parent.context.getDrawableFromAttribute(
 64→        AndroidR.attr.selectableItemBackground
 65→    )
 66→
 67→    private val noTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
 68→    /**
 69→     * Url of an image loaded in the `featuredImageView`.
 70→     */
 71→    private var loadedFeaturedImgUrl: String? = null
 72→
 73→    companion object {
 74→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 78→
 79→    class Standard(
 80→        parent: ViewGroup,
 81→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 82→        uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 83→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 84→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 85→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 86→            setMoreActions(item.moreActions.actions)
 87→
 88→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 89→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 90→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 91→                }
 92→            }
 93→        }
 94→
 95→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
 96→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
 97→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
 98→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
 99→                view.postDelayed({
100→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
101→                }, 1000)
102→                return true
103→            }
104→            return false
105→        }
106→    }
107→
108→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
109→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
110→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, data.excerpt)
111→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
112→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
113→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
114→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
115→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
116→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
117→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
118→            container.background = null
119→        } else {
120→            container.background = selectableBackground
121→        }
122→
123→        if ((data.title != null && data.title != noTitle) && data.excerpt != null) {
124→            titleTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
125→            excerptTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
126→            titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.addOnPreDrawListener(object : ViewTreeObserver.OnPreDrawListener {
127→                override fun onPreDraw(): Boolean {
128→                    // Remove the listener to avoid multiple callbacks
129→                    titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.removeOnPreDrawListener(this)
130→
131→                    // Get the layout of the title text
132→                    val titleLayout = titleTextView.layout
133→
134→                    // Check if the title occupies more than 2 lines
135→                    when (titleLayout.lineCount) {
136→                        1 -> {
137→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 2
138→                        }
139→                        else -> {
140→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 1
141→                            titleTextView.maxLines = 2
142→                        }
143→                    }
144→                    return true
145→                }
146→            })
147→        }
148→    }
149→
150→    protected fun setMoreActions(actions: List<PostListItemAction>) {
151→        moreButton.expandTouchTargetArea(R.dimen.post_list_more_button_extra_padding)
152→        moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(actions, moreButton) }
153→    }
154→
155→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
156→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
157→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
158→        }
159→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
160→    }
161→
162→    private fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
163→        val emptyDrawable = ContextCompat.getDrawable(v.context, R.drawable.ic_placeholder_24dp)
164→        val menu = AppCompatPopupMenu(v.context, v, GravityCompat.END)
165→        MenuCompat.setGroupDividerEnabled(menu.menu, true)
166→        menu.setForceShowIcon(true)
167→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
168→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
169→                singleItemAction.buttonType.groupId,
170→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
171→                Menu.NONE,
172→                singleItemAction.buttonType.textResId
173→            )
174→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
175→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
176→                true
177→            }
178→
179→            setIconAndIconColorIfNeeded(v.context, menuItem, singleItemAction, emptyDrawable)
180→            setTextColorIfNeeded(v.context, menuItem, singleItemAction)
181→        }
182→        menu.show()
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun setIconAndIconColorIfNeeded(
186→        context: Context,
187→        menuItem: MenuItem,
188→        singleItemAction: PostListItemAction,
189→        emptyDrawable: Drawable?
190→    ) {
191→        if (singleItemAction.buttonType.iconResId > 0) {
192→            val icon: Drawable = setTint(
193→                context,
194→                ContextCompat.getDrawable(context, singleItemAction.buttonType.iconResId)!!,
195→                singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId
196→            )
197→            menuItem.icon = icon
198→        } else {
199→            // Leave space for the icon so the text lines up
200→            menuItem.icon = emptyDrawable
201→        }
202→    }
203→
204→    private fun setTextColorIfNeeded(context: Context,
205→                                     menuItem: MenuItem,
206→                                     singleItemAction: PostListItemAction) {
207→        if (singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId > 0 &&
208→            singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId != MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface) {
209→            val menuTitle = context.getText(singleItemAction.buttonType.textResId)
210→            val spannableString = SpannableString(menuTitle)
211→            val textColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId)
212→
213→            spannableString.setSpan(
214→                ForegroundColorSpan(textColor),
215→                0,
216→                spannableString.length,
217→                Spannable.SPAN_INCLUSIVE_INCLUSIVE
218→            )
219→
220→            menuItem.title = spannableString
221→        }
222→    }
223→
224→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
225→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
226→        when (progressBarUiState) {
227→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
228→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
229→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
230→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
231→            }
232→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
233→        }
234→    }
235→
236→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
237→        view: TextView,
238→        statuses: List<UiString>,
239→        delimiter: UiString,
240→        @ColorRes color: Int?
241→    ) {
242→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
243→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
244→        color?.let { statusColor ->
245→            view.setTextColor(
246→                ContextCompat.getColor(
247→                    itemView.context,
248→                    statusColor
249→                )
250→            )
251→        }
252→    }
253→
254→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
255→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
256→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
257→            return
258→        }
259→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
260→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
261→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
262→        } else {
263→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
264→            imageManager.loadImageWithCorners(
265→                featuredImageView,
266→                ImageType.PHOTO_ROUNDED_CORNERS,
267→                imageUrl,
268→                uiHelpers.getPxOfUiDimen(
269→                    WordPress.getContext(),
270→                    UiDimen.UIDimenRes(R.dimen.my_site_post_item_image_corner_radius)
271→                )
272→            )
273→        }
274→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
275→    }
276→
277→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
278→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
279→        if (color != 0) {
280→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
281→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
282→        }
283→        return wrappedDrawable
284→    }
285→}
286→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope

  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.BuildConfig
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.CREATED_NEW_COMMENT
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.CREATE_NEW_COMMENT
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.DELETED_COMMENT
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.DELETE_COMMENT
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCHED_COMMENT
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCHED_COMMENTS
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCHED_COMMENT_LIKES
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCH_COMMENT
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCH_COMMENTS
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCH_COMMENT_LIKES
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.LIKED_COMMENT
 22→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.LIKE_COMMENT
 23→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.PUSHED_COMMENT
 24→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.PUSH_COMMENT
 25→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.REMOVE_ALL_COMMENTS
 26→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.REMOVE_COMMENT
 27→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.REMOVE_COMMENTS
 28→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.UPDATE_COMMENT
 29→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.annotations.action.Action
 30→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.CommentsActionBuilder
 31→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.CommentModel
 32→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.CommentStatus
 33→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 34→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.comments.CommentsMapper
 35→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.FetchCommentsPayload
 36→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.RemoteCommentPayload
 37→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.RemoteCreateCommentPayload
 38→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentsStore
 39→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 40→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 41→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 42→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 43→import javax.inject.Inject
 44→import javax.inject.Named
 45→import javax.inject.Singleton
 46→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 47→
 48→@Deprecated(
 49→    "This code is a temporary code until all the comments parts are ported to room " +
 50→            "trying to minimize the changes to existing code not yet ported"
 51→)
 52→@Singleton
 53→class CommentsStoreAdapter @Inject constructor(
 54→    private val unifiedStore: CommentsStore,
 55→    private val commentsMapper: CommentsMapper,
 56→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 57→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 58→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher
 59→) : CoroutineScope {
 60→    private var job: Job = Job()
 61→
 62→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 63→        get() = mainDispatcher + job
 64→
 65→    fun getCommentsForSite(
 66→        site: SiteModel?,
 67→        orderByDateAscending: Boolean,
 68→        limit: Int,
 69→        vararg statuses: CommentStatus
 70→    ): List<CommentModel> {
 71→        return runBlocking {
 72→            withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 73→                unifiedStore.getCommentsForSite(site, orderByDateAscending, limit, *statuses).map {
 74→                    commentsMapper.commentEntityToLegacyModel(it)
 75→                }
 76→            }
 77→        }
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    fun getCommentByLocalId(localId: Int): CommentModel? {
 81→        return runBlocking {
 82→            withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 83→                unifiedStore.getCommentByLocalId(localId.toLong()).firstOrNull()?.let {
 84→                    commentsMapper.commentEntityToLegacyModel(it)
 85→                }
 86→            }
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    fun getCommentBySiteAndRemoteId(site: SiteModel, remoteCommentId: Long): CommentModel? {
 91→        return runBlocking {
 92→            withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 93→                unifiedStore.getCommentByLocalSiteAndRemoteId(site.id, remoteCommentId).firstOrNull()?.let {
 94→                    commentsMapper.commentEntityToLegacyModel(it)
 95→                }
 96→            }
 97→        }
 98→    }
 99→
100→    @Suppress("unused", "FunctionParameterNaming")
101→    fun register(`object`: Any?) {
102→        dispatcher.register(`object`)
103→    }
104→
105→    @Suppress("unused", "FunctionParameterNaming")
106→    fun unregister(`object`: Any?) {
107→        dispatcher.unregister(`object`)
108→    }
109→
110→    fun dispatch(action: Action<*>) {
111→        if (action.type !is CommentAction) {
112→            dispatcher.dispatch(action)
113→            return
114→        }
115→
116→        val actionToDispatch = when (action.type as CommentAction) {
117→            FETCH_COMMENTS -> CommentsActionBuilder.newFetchCommentsAction(action.payload as FetchCommentsPayload)
118→            FETCH_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newFetchCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
119→            CREATE_NEW_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newCreateNewCommentAction(
120→                action.payload as RemoteCreateCommentPayload
121→            )
122→            PUSH_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newPushCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
123→            DELETE_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newDeleteCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
124→            LIKE_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newLikeCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
125→            UPDATE_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newUpdateCommentAction(action.payload as CommentModel)
126→            FETCH_COMMENT_LIKES,
127→            FETCHED_COMMENTS,
128→            FETCHED_COMMENT,
129→            CREATED_NEW_COMMENT,
130→            PUSHED_COMMENT,
131→            DELETED_COMMENT,
132→            LIKED_COMMENT,
133→            FETCHED_COMMENT_LIKES,
134→            REMOVE_COMMENTS,
135→            REMOVE_COMMENT,
136→            REMOVE_ALL_COMMENTS -> {
137→                logOrCrash("CommentsStoreAdapter->dispatch: action received ${action.type} was not expected")
138→                null
139→            }
140→        }
141→
142→        actionToDispatch?.let {
143→            dispatcher.dispatch(actionToDispatch)
144→        }
145→    }
146→
147→    private fun logOrCrash(msg: String) {
148→        if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
149→            throw IllegalArgumentException(msg)
150→        } else {
151→            AppLog.e(T.COMMENTS, msg)
152→        }
153→    }
154→}

1→<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
  2→<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"

  7→    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
  8→    android:layout_gravity="center">
  9→
 10→    <Space
 11→        android:id="@+id/topspace"
 12→        android:layout_width="0dp"
 13→        android:layout_height="8dp"
 14→        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
 15→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
 16→        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
 17→
 18→    <!-- text area -->
 19→    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
 20→        android:id="@+id/final_text_unit"

 22→        android:layout_height="wrap_content"

 37→            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"

 40→            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"

 44→
 45→        <ImageButton

 58→    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
 59→
 60→    <!-- mid section area -->
 61→    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
 62→        android:id="@+id/final_mid_section"

 64→        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 65→        android:layout_marginEnd="16dp"
 66→        android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
 67→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
 68→        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/final_text_unit">
 69→
 70→        <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
 71→            android:id="@+id/text_container"
 72→            android:layout_width="0dp"
 73→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 74→            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
 75→            app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/space_between"
 76→            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
 77→            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
 78→
 79→            <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView
 80→                android:id="@+id/title"
 81→                style="@style/PostList.Item.Title"
 82→                android:layout_width="0dp"
 83→                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 84→                android:ellipsize="end"
 85→                android:maxLines="3"
 86→                app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
 87→                app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
 88→                app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"
 89→                tools:text="My Title is super duper long and longer than the fox that is running into the area of large text and will have to cut off the remaining" />
 90→
 91→            <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView
 92→                android:id="@+id/excerpt"
 93→                style="@style/PostList.Item.Body"

 97→                android:ellipsize="end"
 98→                android:maxLines="3"
 99→                app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
100→                app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
101→                app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/title"
102→                tools:text="this is the excerpt that will possibly show in this area" />
103→        </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
104→
105→        <Space
106→            android:id="@+id/space_between"
107→            android:layout_width="8dp"
108→            android:layout_height="0dp"
109→            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
110→            app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/image_featured"

113→
114→        <ImageView
115→            android:id="@+id/image_featured"
116→            android:layout_width="@dimen/postlist_featured_image_height"
117→            android:layout_height="@dimen/postlist_featured_image_height"

122→            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/text_container"
123→            tools:srcCompat="@tools:sample/avatars" />
124→    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
125→
126→    <FrameLayout
127→        android:id="@+id/disabled_overlay"

134→        android:visibility="gone"
135→        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
136→        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
137→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
138→        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
139→
140→    <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView
141→        android:id="@+id/statuses_label"
142→        style="@style/PostList.Item.Body"
143→        android:layout_width="0dp"
144→        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
145→        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_extra_large"
146→        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_extra_large"
147→        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/upload_progress"
148→        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
149→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
150→        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/final_mid_section"
151→        app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.0"
152→        tools:text="Private · Local Changes Private · Local Changes Private · Local Changes Private · Local Changes Private · Local Changes " />
153→
154→    <ProgressBar
155→        android:id="@+id/upload_progress"
156→        style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
157→        android:layout_width="0dp"
158→        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
159→        android:layout_marginEnd="16dp"
160→        android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
161→        android:indeterminate="true"
162→        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
163→        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
164→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
165→        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/statuses_label" />
166→
167→    <Space
168→        android:id="@+id/space2"
169→        android:layout_width="0dp"
170→        android:layout_height="8dp"
171→        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
172→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
173→        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
174→        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/upload_progress" />
175→
176→    <View
177→        android:id="@+id/divider"
178→        android:layout_width="match_parent"
179→        android:layout_height="1dp"
180→        android:layout_marginEnd="0dp"
181→        android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
182→        android:background="?android:attr/listDivider"
183→        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
184→        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
185→        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/space2" />
186→
187→</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

  3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint

 53→import org.wordpress.android.R
 54→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
 55→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityNavigator
 56→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.MainTopAppBar
 57→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.NavigationIcons
 58→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.theme.AppTheme
 59→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.utils.LocaleAwareComposable
 60→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.utils.uiStringText
 61→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.SiteNavigationAction
 62→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.items.listitem.ListItemAction
 63→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 64→import org.wordpress.android.ui.quickstart.QuickStartMySitePrompts
 65→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.ListItemInteraction
 66→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 67→import org.wordpress.android.util.LocaleManager
 68→import org.wordpress.android.util.QuickStartUtilsWrapper
 69→import org.wordpress.android.util.SnackbarItem
 70→import org.wordpress.android.util.SnackbarSequencer
 71→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getParcelableExtraCompat
 72→import javax.inject.Inject
 73→
 74→const val KEY_QUICK_START_EVENT = "key_quick_start_event"
 75→@AndroidEntryPoint
 76→class MenuActivity : AppCompatActivity() {
 77→    @Inject
 78→    lateinit var activityNavigator: ActivityNavigator
 79→
 80→    @Inject
 81→    lateinit var snackbarSequencer: SnackbarSequencer
 82→
 83→    @Inject
 84→    lateinit var quickStartUtils: QuickStartUtilsWrapper
 85→
 86→    private val viewModel: MenuViewModel by viewModels()
 87→
 88→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 89→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 90→        initObservers()
 91→        setContent {
 92→            AppTheme {
 93→                val userLanguage by viewModel.refreshAppLanguage.observeAsState("")
 94→
 95→                LocaleAwareComposable(
 96→                    locale = LocaleManager.languageLocale(userLanguage),
 97→                    onLocaleChange = viewModel::setAppLanguage
 98→                ) {
 99→                    viewModel.start(intent.getParcelableExtraCompat(KEY_QUICK_START_EVENT))
100→                    MenuScreen()
101→                }
102→            }
103→        }
104→    }
105→
106→    private fun initObservers() {
107→        viewModel.navigation.observe(this) { handleNavigationAction(it.getContentIfNotHandled()) }
108→        viewModel.onSnackbarMessage.observe(this) { showSnackbar(it.getContentIfNotHandled()) }
109→        viewModel.onQuickStartMySitePrompts.observe(this) { handleActiveTutorialPrompt(it.getContentIfNotHandled()) }
110→
111→        // Set the Compose callback for SnackbarSequencer
112→        snackbarSequencer.setComposeSnackbarCallback { item ->
113→            item?.let { viewModel.showSnackbarRequest(it) }
114→        }
115→    }
116→
117→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
118→    private fun handleNavigationAction(action: SiteNavigationAction?) {
119→        when (action) {
120→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLog -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogList(this, action.site)
121→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBackup -> ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(this, action.site)
122→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScan -> ActivityLauncher.viewScan(this, action.site)
123→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlan -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogPlans(this, action.site)
124→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPosts -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPosts(this, action.site)
125→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPages(this, action.site)
126→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenAdmin -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogAdmin(this, action.site)
127→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPeople -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPeople(this, action.site)
128→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSharing -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSharing(this, action.site)
129→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSiteSettings -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSettingsForResult(this, action.site)
130→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenThemes -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogThemes(this, action.site)
131→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlugins -> ActivityLauncher.viewPluginBrowser(this, action.site)
132→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMedia -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogMedia(this, action.site)
133→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMeScreen -> ActivityLauncher.viewMeActivityForResult(this)
134→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenUnifiedComments -> ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(this, action.site)
135→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(this, action.site)
136→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomains -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainsDashboardActivity(
137→                this,
138→                action.site
139→            )
140→            is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCampaignListingPage -> activityNavigator.navigateToCampaignListingPage(
141→                this,
142→                action.campaignListingPageSource
143→            )
144→            else -> {}
145→        }
146→    }
147→
148→    private fun showSnackbar(holder: SnackbarMessageHolder?) {
149→        holder?.let {
150→            snackbarSequencer.enqueue(
151→                SnackbarItem(
152→                    info = SnackbarItem.Info(
153→                        view = window.decorView.findViewById(android.R.id.content),
154→                        textRes = holder.message,
155→                        duration = holder.duration,
156→                        isImportant = holder.isImportant
157→                    ),
158→                    action = holder.buttonTitle?.let {
159→                        SnackbarItem.Action(
160→                            textRes = holder.buttonTitle,
161→                            clickListener = { holder.buttonAction() }
162→                        )
163→                    },
164→                    dismissCallback = { _, event -> holder.onDismissAction(event) }
165→                )
166→            )
167→        }
168→    }
169→
170→    private fun handleActiveTutorialPrompt(activeTutorialPrompt: QuickStartMySitePrompts?) {
171→        activeTutorialPrompt?.let {
172→            val message = quickStartUtils.stylizeQuickStartPrompt(
173→                this,
174→                activeTutorialPrompt.shortMessagePrompt,
175→                activeTutorialPrompt.iconId
176→            )
177→
178→            showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiString.UiStringText(message)))
179→        }
180→    }
181→
182→    override fun onResume() {
183→        super.onResume()
184→        viewModel.onResume()
185→    }
186→
187→    override fun onStop() {
188→        snackbarSequencer.clearComposeSnackbarCallback()
189→        super.onStop()
190→    }
191→
192→    @Composable
193→    @SuppressLint("UnusedMaterialScaffoldPaddingParameter")
194→    fun MenuScreen(modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
195→        val scaffoldState = rememberScaffoldState()
196→
197→        Scaffold(
198→            scaffoldState = scaffoldState,
199→            snackbarHost = { snackbarHostState ->
200→                SnackbarHost(hostState = snackbarHostState)
201→            },
202→            topBar = {
203→                MainTopAppBar(
204→                    title = stringResource(id = R.string.my_site_section_screen_title),
205→                    navigationIcon = NavigationIcons.BackIcon,
206→                    onNavigationIconClick = onBackPressedDispatcher::onBackPressed,
207→                )
208→            },
209→            content = {
210→                MenuContent(modifier = modifier)
211→            }
212→        )
213→        LaunchedEffect(viewModel.snackBar) {
214→            viewModel.snackBar.collect { message ->
215→                scaffoldState.snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(
216→                    message.message, message.actionLabel, message.duration)
217→            }
218→        }
219→    }
220→
221→
222→    @Composable
223→    fun MenuContent(modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
224→        val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
225→
226→        LazyColumn(
227→            modifier = modifier
228→                .fillMaxWidth()
229→                .wrapContentSize()
230→                .padding(16.dp),
231→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp),
232→        ) {
233→            items(uiState.items) { viewState ->
234→                when (viewState) {
235→                    is MenuItemState.MenuListItem-> MySiteListItem(viewState)
236→                    is MenuItemState.MenuHeaderItem -> MySiteListItemHeader(viewState)
237→                    is MenuItemState.MenuEmptyHeaderItem -> MySiteListItemEmptyHeader()
238→                }
239→            }
240→        }
241→    }
242→}

247→        text = uiStringText(headerItem.title),

251→        modifier = Modifier
252→            .padding(start = 16.dp, top = 8.dp, end = 16.dp, bottom = 8.dp)
253→    )
254→}

259→}

261→@Composable
262→fun MySiteListItem(item: MenuItemState.MenuListItem, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
263→    Box(
264→        modifier = modifier
265→            .fillMaxWidth()
266→            .wrapContentSize()
267→    )
268→    {
269→        Row(
270→            modifier = Modifier
271→                .fillMaxWidth()
272→                .wrapContentSize()
273→                .clickable { item.onClick.click() }
274→                .padding(start = 12.dp, top = 6.dp, end = 16.dp, bottom = 6.dp),
275→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
276→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.Start,
277→            content = {
278→            Image(
279→                painter = painterResource(id = item.primaryIcon),
280→                contentDescription = null, // Add appropriate content description
281→                contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
282→                modifier = Modifier
283→                    .size(24.dp)
284→                    .padding(1.dp),
285→                colorFilter =
286→                if (item.disablePrimaryIconTint) null else ColorFilter.tint(MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface)
287→            )
288→            Spacer(Modifier.width(16.dp))
289→            Text(
290→                text = uiStringText(item.primaryText),
291→                fontSize = 16.sp,
292→                fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
293→                color = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface.copy(alpha = ContentAlpha.high),
294→                modifier = Modifier
295→                    .padding(start = 8.dp, end = 8.dp),
296→            )
297→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier
298→                .height(4.dp)
299→                .weight(1f))
300→
301→            if (item.secondaryText != null) {
302→                Text(
303→                    text = uiStringText(item.secondaryText),
304→                    fontSize = 12.sp,
305→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
306→                    color = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface.copy(alpha = ContentAlpha.medium),
307→                    modifier = Modifier
308→                        .weight(1f)
309→                        .padding(start = 8.dp, end = 8.dp),
310→                )
311→            }
312→
313→            if (item.secondaryIcon != null) {
314→                Image(
315→                    painter = painterResource(id = item.secondaryIcon),
316→                    contentDescription = null, // Add appropriate content description
317→                    contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
318→                    modifier = Modifier
319→                        .size(24.dp)
320→                        .padding(1.dp),
321→                    colorFilter = ColorFilter.tint(MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface)
322→                )
323→            }
324→
325→            if (item.showFocusPoint) CustomXMLWidgetView()
326→        })
327→    }
328→}
329→@Composable
330→fun CustomXMLWidgetView(modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
331→    // Load the custom XML widget using AndroidView
332→    var customView: View? by remember { mutableStateOf(null) }
333→    val context = LocalContext.current
334→
335→    DisposableEffect(context) {
336→        // Perform the side effect (inflate view) when the composable is composed
337→        customView = FrameLayout(context).apply {
338→            addView(LayoutInflater.from(context).inflate(R.layout.quick_start_focus_point, this, false))
339→        }
340→
341→        onDispose {
342→            customView = null
343→        }
344→    }
345→    customView?.let { view ->
346→        AndroidView(
347→            factory =  { view },
348→            modifier = modifier.wrapContentSize(Alignment.Center)
349→        )
350→    }
351→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified
 2→
 3→import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
 4→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 5→import androidx.viewpager2.adapter.FragmentStateAdapter
 6→import java.lang.ref.WeakReference
 7→
 8→class UnifiedCommentListPagerAdapter(
 9→    private val pages: List<CommentFilter>,
10→    fragmentActivity: FragmentActivity
11→) : FragmentStateAdapter(fragmentActivity) {
12→    private val listFragments = mutableMapOf<Int, WeakReference<UnifiedCommentListFragment>>()
13→
14→    fun getItemAtPosition(position: Int): UnifiedCommentListFragment? {
15→        return listFragments[position]?.get()
16→    }
17→
18→    override fun getItemCount(): Int = pages.size
19→
20→    override fun createFragment(position: Int): Fragment {
21→        val fragment = UnifiedCommentListFragment.newInstance(pages[position])
22→        listFragments[position] = WeakReference(fragment)
23→        return fragment
24→    }
25→}
