1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified
  2→
  3→import androidx.annotation.StringRes
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
  9→import org.wordpress.android.R
 10→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat.COMMENT_EDITED
 11→import org.wordpress.android.datasets.wrappers.ReaderCommentTableWrapper
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.persistence.comments.CommentsDao.CommentEntity
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentsStore
 15→import org.wordpress.android.models.usecases.LocalCommentCacheUpdateHandler
 16→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 17→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentIdentifier.NotificationCommentIdentifier
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentIdentifier.ReaderCommentIdentifier
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.CommentIdentifier.SiteCommentIdentifier
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.EditCommentActionEvent.CANCEL_EDIT_CONFIRM
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.EditCommentActionEvent.CLOSE
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.EditCommentActionEvent.DONE
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.FieldType.COMMENT
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.FieldType.USER_EMAIL
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.FieldType.USER_NAME
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.FieldType.WEB_ADDRESS
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.ProgressState.LOADING
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.ProgressState.NOT_VISIBLE
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel.ProgressState.SAVING
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.extension.isNotEqualTo
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.comments.unified.usecase.GetCommentUseCase
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.notifications.utils.NotificationsActionsWrapper
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 37→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 38→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsUtils.AnalyticsCommentActionSource
 39→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 40→import org.wordpress.android.util.validateEmail
 41→import org.wordpress.android.util.validateUrl
 42→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 43→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ResourceProvider
 44→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ScopedViewModel
 45→import javax.inject.Inject
 46→import javax.inject.Named
 47→
 48→class UnifiedCommentsEditViewModel @Inject constructor(
 49→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 50→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 51→    private val commentsStore: CommentsStore,
 52→    private val resourceProvider: ResourceProvider,
 53→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 54→    private val localCommentCacheUpdateHandler: LocalCommentCacheUpdateHandler,
 55→    private val getCommentUseCase: GetCommentUseCase,
 56→    private val notificationActionsWrapper: NotificationsActionsWrapper,
 57→    private val readerCommentTableWrapper: ReaderCommentTableWrapper,
 58→    private val analyticsUtilsWrapper: AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 59→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
 60→    private val _uiState = MutableLiveData<EditCommentUiState>()
 61→    private val _uiActionEvent = MutableLiveData<Event<EditCommentActionEvent>>()
 62→    private val _onSnackbarMessage = MutableLiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>>()
 63→
 64→    val uiState: LiveData<EditCommentUiState> = _uiState
 65→    val uiActionEvent: LiveData<Event<EditCommentActionEvent>> = _uiActionEvent
 66→    val onSnackbarMessage: LiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>> = _onSnackbarMessage
 67→
 68→    private var isStarted = false
 69→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
 70→
 71→    private lateinit var commentIdentifier: CommentIdentifier
 72→
 73→    data class EditErrorStrings(
 74→        val userNameError: String? = null,
 75→        val commentTextError: String? = null,
 76→        val userUrlError: String? = null,
 77→        val userEmailError: String? = null
 78→    )
 79→
 80→    data class EditCommentUiState(
 81→        val canSaveChanges: Boolean,
 82→        val shouldInitComment: Boolean,
 83→        val shouldInitWatchers: Boolean,
 84→        val showProgress: Boolean = false,
 85→        val progressText: UiString? = null,
 86→        val originalComment: CommentEssentials,
 87→        val editedComment: CommentEssentials,
 88→        val editErrorStrings: EditErrorStrings,
 89→        val inputSettings: InputSettings
 90→    )
 91→
 92→    data class InputSettings(
 93→        val enableEditName: Boolean,
 94→        val enableEditUrl: Boolean,
 95→        val enableEditEmail: Boolean,
 96→        val enableEditComment: Boolean
 97→    )
 98→
 99→    enum class ProgressState(val show: Boolean, val progressText: UiString?) {
100→        NOT_VISIBLE(false, null),
101→        LOADING(true, UiStringRes(R.string.loading)),
102→        SAVING(true, UiStringRes(R.string.saving_changes))
103→    }
104→
105→    enum class FieldType(@StringRes val errorStringRes: Int, val isValid: (String) -> Boolean) {
106→        USER_NAME(R.string.comment_edit_user_name_error, { Utilities.isValidUserName(it) }),
107→        USER_EMAIL(R.string.comment_edit_user_email_error, { Utilities.isValidUserEmail(it) }),
108→        WEB_ADDRESS(R.string.comment_edit_web_address_error, { Utilities.isValidWebAddress(it) }),
109→        COMMENT(R.string.comment_edit_comment_error, { Utilities.isValidComment(it) });
110→
111→        // This is here for testing purposes
112→        fun matches(expectedField: FieldType): Boolean {
113→            return this == expectedField
114→        }
115→
116→        private object Utilities {
117→            fun isValidUserName(userName: String): Boolean {
118→                return userName.isNotBlank()
119→            }
120→
121→            fun isValidUserEmail(email: String): Boolean {
122→                return email.isBlank() || validateEmail(email)
123→            }
124→
125→            fun isValidWebAddress(url: String): Boolean {
126→                return url.isBlank() || validateUrl(url)
127→            }
128→
129→            fun isValidComment(comment: String): Boolean {
130→                return comment.isNotBlank()
131→            }
132→        }
133→    }
134→
135→    enum class EditCommentActionEvent {
136→        CLOSE,
137→        DONE,
138→        CANCEL_EDIT_CONFIRM
139→    }
140→
141→    fun start(site: SiteModel, commentIdentifier: CommentIdentifier) {
142→        if (isStarted) {
143→            // If we are here, the fragment view was recreated (like in a configuration change)
144→            // so we reattach the watchers.
145→            _uiState.value = _uiState.value?.copy(shouldInitWatchers = true)
146→            return
147→        }
148→        isStarted = true
149→
150→        this.site = site
151→        this.commentIdentifier = commentIdentifier
152→
153→        initViews()
154→    }
155→
156→    private suspend fun setLoadingState(state: ProgressState) {
157→        val uiState = _uiState.value ?: EditCommentUiState(
158→            canSaveChanges = false,
159→            shouldInitComment = false,
160→            shouldInitWatchers = false,
161→            showProgress = LOADING.show,
162→            progressText = LOADING.progressText,
163→            originalComment = CommentEssentials(),
164→            editedComment = CommentEssentials(),
165→            editErrorStrings = EditErrorStrings(),
166→            inputSettings = mapInputSettings(CommentEssentials())
167→        )
168→
169→        withContext(mainDispatcher) {
170→            _uiState.value = uiState.copy(
171→                showProgress = state.show,
172→                progressText = state.progressText
173→            )
174→        }
175→    }
176→
177→    fun onActionMenuClicked() {
178→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
179→            _onSnackbarMessage.value = Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message)))
180→            return
181→        }
182→        _uiState.value?.let { uiState ->
183→            val editedCommentEssentials = uiState.editedComment
184→            launch(bgDispatcher) {
185→                setLoadingState(SAVING)
186→                updateComment(editedCommentEssentials)
187→            }
188→        }
189→    }
190→
191→    fun onBackPressed() {
192→        _uiState.value?.let {
193→            if (it.editedComment.isNotEqualTo(it.originalComment)) {
194→                _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CANCEL_EDIT_CONFIRM)
195→            } else {
196→                _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CLOSE)
197→            }
198→        }
199→    }
200→
201→    fun onConfirmEditingDiscard() {
202→        _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CLOSE)
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun initViews() {
206→        launch {
207→            setLoadingState(LOADING)
208→
209→            val commentEssentials = withContext(bgDispatcher) {
210→                mapCommentEssentials()
211→            }
212→            if (commentEssentials.isValid()) {
213→                _uiState.value =
214→                    EditCommentUiState(
215→                        canSaveChanges = false,
216→                        shouldInitComment = true,
217→                        shouldInitWatchers = true,
218→                        showProgress = LOADING.show,
219→                        progressText = LOADING.progressText,
220→                        originalComment = commentEssentials,
221→                        editedComment = commentEssentials,
222→                        editErrorStrings = EditErrorStrings(),
223→                        inputSettings = mapInputSettings(commentEssentials)
224→                    )
225→            } else {
226→                _onSnackbarMessage.value = Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(
227→                    message = UiStringRes(R.string.error_load_comment),
228→                    onDismissAction = { _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CLOSE) }
229→                ))
230→            }
231→            delay(LOADING_DELAY_MS)
232→            setLoadingState(NOT_VISIBLE)
233→        }
234→    }
235→
236→    private suspend fun mapCommentEssentials(): CommentEssentials {
237→        val commentEntity = getCommentUseCase.execute(site, commentIdentifier.remoteCommentId)
238→        return if (commentEntity != null) {
239→            CommentEssentials(
240→                commentId = commentEntity.id,
241→                userName = commentEntity.authorName ?: "",
242→                commentText = commentEntity.content ?: "",
243→                userUrl = commentEntity.authorUrl ?: "",
244→                userEmail = commentEntity.authorEmail ?: "",
245→                isFromRegisteredUser = commentEntity.authorId > 0
246→            )
247→        } else {
248→            CommentEssentials()
249→        }
250→    }
251→
252→    private suspend fun updateComment(editedCommentEssentials: CommentEssentials) {
253→        val commentEntity =
254→            commentsStore.getCommentByLocalSiteAndRemoteId(site.id, commentIdentifier.remoteCommentId).firstOrNull()
255→        commentEntity?.run {
256→            val isCommentEntityUpdated = updateCommentEntity(this, editedCommentEssentials)
257→            if (isCommentEntityUpdated) {
258→                analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackCommentActionWithSiteDetails(
259→                    COMMENT_EDITED,
260→                    commentIdentifier.toCommentActionSource(),
261→                    site
262→                )
263→                when (commentIdentifier) {
264→                    is NotificationCommentIdentifier -> {
265→                        updateNotificationEntity()
266→                    }
267→                    is ReaderCommentIdentifier -> {
268→                        updateReaderEntity(editedCommentEssentials)
269→                    }
270→                    else -> {
271→                        _uiActionEvent.postValue(Event(DONE))
272→                        localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.requestCommentsUpdate()
273→                    }
274→                }
275→            } else {
276→                showUpdateCommentError()
277→            }
278→        } ?: showUpdateCommentError()
279→    }
280→
281→    private suspend fun updateCommentEntity(
282→        comment: CommentEntity,
283→        editedCommentEssentials: CommentEssentials
284→    ): Boolean {
285→        val updatedComment = comment.copy(
286→            authorUrl = editedCommentEssentials.userUrl,
287→            authorName = editedCommentEssentials.userName,
288→            authorEmail = editedCommentEssentials.userEmail,
289→            content = editedCommentEssentials.commentText
290→        )
291→
292→        val result = commentsStore.updateEditComment(site, updatedComment)
293→        return !result.isError
294→    }
295→
296→    private suspend fun updateNotificationEntity() {
297→        with(commentIdentifier as NotificationCommentIdentifier) {
298→            val isNotificationEntityUpdated = notificationActionsWrapper.downloadNoteAndUpdateDB(noteId)
299→            if (isNotificationEntityUpdated) {
300→                _uiActionEvent.postValue(Event(DONE))
301→                localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.requestCommentsUpdate()
302→            } else {
303→                showUpdateNotificationError()
304→            }
305→        }
306→    }
307→
308→    private suspend fun updateReaderEntity(commentEssentials: CommentEssentials) {
309→        val readerCommentIdentifier = commentIdentifier as ReaderCommentIdentifier
310→
311→        val readerComment = readerCommentTableWrapper.getComment(
312→            site.siteId,
313→            readerCommentIdentifier.postId,
314→            readerCommentIdentifier.remoteCommentId
315→        )
316→
317→        readerComment?.apply {
318→            text = commentEssentials.commentText
319→            authorName = commentEssentials.userName
320→            authorEmail = commentEssentials.userEmail
321→            authorUrl = commentEssentials.userUrl
322→            readerCommentTableWrapper.addOrUpdateComment(readerComment)
323→        }
324→        _uiActionEvent.postValue(Event(DONE))
325→        localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.requestCommentsUpdate()
326→    }
327→
328→    private suspend fun showUpdateCommentError() {
329→        setLoadingState(NOT_VISIBLE)
330→        _onSnackbarMessage.postValue(
331→            Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_edit_comment)))
332→        )
333→    }
334→
335→    private suspend fun showUpdateNotificationError() {
336→        setLoadingState(NOT_VISIBLE)
337→        _onSnackbarMessage.postValue(
338→            Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_edit_notification)))
339→        )
340→    }
341→
342→    fun onValidateField(field: String, fieldType: FieldType) {
343→        _uiState.value?.let {
344→            val fieldError = if (fieldType.isValid.invoke(field)) {
345→                null
346→            } else {
347→                resourceProvider.getString(fieldType.errorStringRes)
348→            }
349→
350→            val previousComment = it.editedComment
351→            val previousErrors = it.editErrorStrings
352→
353→            val editedComment = previousComment.copy(
354→                userName = if (fieldType.matches(USER_NAME)) field else previousComment.userName,
355→                commentText = if (fieldType.matches(COMMENT)) field else previousComment.commentText,
356→                userUrl = if (fieldType.matches(WEB_ADDRESS)) field else previousComment.userUrl,
357→                userEmail = if (fieldType.matches(USER_EMAIL)) field else previousComment.userEmail
358→            )
359→
360→            val errors = previousErrors.copy(
361→                userNameError = if (fieldType.matches(USER_NAME)) fieldError else previousErrors.userNameError,
362→                commentTextError = if (fieldType.matches(COMMENT)) fieldError else previousErrors.commentTextError,
363→                userUrlError = if (fieldType.matches(WEB_ADDRESS)) fieldError else previousErrors.userUrlError,
364→                userEmailError = if (fieldType.matches(USER_EMAIL)) fieldError else previousErrors.userEmailError
365→            )
366→
367→            _uiState.value = it.copy(
368→                canSaveChanges = editedComment.isNotEqualTo(it.originalComment) && !errors.hasError(),
369→                shouldInitComment = false,
370→                shouldInitWatchers = false,
371→                editedComment = editedComment,
372→                editErrorStrings = errors
373→            )
374→        }
375→    }
376→
377→    private fun mapInputSettings(commentEssentials: CommentEssentials) = InputSettings(
378→        enableEditName = !commentEssentials.isFromRegisteredUser,
379→        enableEditUrl = !commentEssentials.isFromRegisteredUser,
380→        enableEditEmail = !commentEssentials.isFromRegisteredUser,
381→        enableEditComment = true
382→    )
383→
384→    private fun EditErrorStrings.hasError(): Boolean {
385→        return listOf(
386→            this.commentTextError,
387→            this.userEmailError,
388→            this.userNameError,
389→            this.userUrlError
390→        ).any { !it.isNullOrEmpty() }
391→    }
392→
393→    private fun CommentIdentifier.toCommentActionSource(): AnalyticsCommentActionSource {
394→        return when (this) {
395→            is NotificationCommentIdentifier -> {
396→                AnalyticsCommentActionSource.NOTIFICATIONS
397→            }
398→            is ReaderCommentIdentifier -> {
399→                AnalyticsCommentActionSource.READER
400→            }
401→            is SiteCommentIdentifier -> {
402→                AnalyticsCommentActionSource.SITE_COMMENTS
403→            }
404→        }
405→    }
406→
407→    companion object {
408→        private const val LOADING_DELAY_MS = 300L
409→    }
410→}

28→fun trackPostListAction(site: SiteModel, buttonType: PostListButtonType, postData: PostModel, statsEvent: Stat) {
29→    val properties = HashMap<String, Any?>()
30→    if (!postData.isLocalDraft) {
31→        properties["post_id"] = postData.remotePostId
32→    }
33→
34→    properties["action"] = when (buttonType) {
35→        BUTTON_EDIT -> {
36→            properties[AnalyticsUtils.HAS_GUTENBERG_BLOCKS_KEY] = PostUtils
37→                .contentContainsGutenbergBlocks(postData.content)
38→            "edit"
39→        }
40→        BUTTON_RETRY -> "retry"
41→        BUTTON_SUBMIT -> "submit"
42→        BUTTON_VIEW -> "view"
43→        BUTTON_PREVIEW -> "preview"
44→        BUTTON_STATS -> "stats"
45→        BUTTON_TRASH -> "trash"
46→        BUTTON_COPY -> "copy"
47→        BUTTON_DELETE,
48→        BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete"
49→        BUTTON_PUBLISH -> "publish"
50→        BUTTON_SYNC -> "sync"
51→        BUTTON_MORE -> "more"
52→        BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> "move_to_draft"
53→        BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD -> "cancel_pending_auto_upload"
54→        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG -> "show_move_trashed_post_to_draft_post_dialog"
55→        BUTTON_COPY_URL -> "copy_url"
56→        BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> "promote_with_blaze"
57→        BUTTON_COMMENTS -> "comments"
58→    }
59→
60→    AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(statsEvent, site, properties)
61→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.notifications.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
  4→import org.wordpress.android.R
  5→import org.wordpress.android.datasets.ReaderPostTable
  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.tools.FormattableRange
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.tools.FormattableRangeType
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderPost
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.WPWebViewActivity
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.ReaderActivityLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.comments.ThreadedCommentsActionSource
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.comments.ThreadedCommentsActionSource.ACTIVITY_LOG_DETAIL
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.tracker.ReaderTracker
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.ReaderUtils
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.StatsViewType.FOLLOWERS
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 20→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T.API
 21→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 22→import javax.inject.Inject
 23→
 24→private const val DOMAIN_WP_COM = "wordpress.com"
 25→
 26→class FormattableContentClickHandler @Inject constructor(
 27→    val siteStore: SiteStore,
 28→    val readerTracker: ReaderTracker
 29→) {
 30→    fun onClick(
 31→        activity: FragmentActivity,
 32→        clickedSpan: FormattableRange,
 33→        source: String
 34→    ) {
 35→        if (activity.isFinishing) {
 36→            return
 37→        }
 38→        val id = clickedSpan.id ?: 0
 39→        val siteId = clickedSpan.siteId ?: 0
 40→        val postId = clickedSpan.postId ?: 0
 41→        when (val rangeType = clickedSpan.rangeType()) {
 42→            FormattableRangeType.SITE ->
 43→                // Show blog preview
 44→                showBlogPreviewActivity(activity, id, postId, source)
 45→            FormattableRangeType.USER ->
 46→                // Show blog preview
 47→                showBlogPreviewActivity(activity, siteId, postId, source)
 48→            FormattableRangeType.PAGE, FormattableRangeType.POST ->
 49→                // Show post detail
 50→                showPostActivity(activity, siteId, id)
 51→            FormattableRangeType.COMMENT -> {
 52→                // Load the comment in the reader list if it exists, otherwise show a webview
 53→                val rootId = clickedSpan.postId ?: clickedSpan.rootId ?: 0
 54→                if (ReaderUtils.postAndCommentExists(siteId, rootId, id)) {
 55→                    showReaderCommentsList(activity, siteId, rootId, id, ACTIVITY_LOG_DETAIL)
 56→                } else {
 57→                    showWebViewActivityForUrl(activity, clickedSpan.url, rangeType)
 58→                }
 59→            }
 60→            FormattableRangeType.STAT, FormattableRangeType.FOLLOW ->
 61→                // We can open native stats if the site is a wpcom or Jetpack sites
 62→                showStatsActivityForSite(activity, siteId, rangeType)
 63→            FormattableRangeType.LIKE -> if (ReaderPostTable.postExists(siteId, id)) {
 64→                showReaderPostLikeUsers(activity, siteId, id)
 65→            } else {
 66→                showPostActivity(activity, siteId, id)
 67→            }
 68→            FormattableRangeType.REWIND_DOWNLOAD_READY -> showBackup(activity, siteId)
 69→            FormattableRangeType.BLOCKQUOTE,
 70→            FormattableRangeType.NOTICON,
 71→            FormattableRangeType.MATCH,
 72→            FormattableRangeType.MEDIA,
 73→            FormattableRangeType.UNKNOWN -> {
 74→                showWebViewActivityForUrl(activity, clickedSpan.url, rangeType)
 75→            }
 76→            FormattableRangeType.SCAN -> Unit // Do nothing
 77→            FormattableRangeType.B -> Unit // Do nothing
 78→        }
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun showBlogPreviewActivity(
 82→        activity: FragmentActivity,
 83→        siteId: Long,
 84→        postId: Long,
 85→        source: String
 86→    ) {
 87→        val post: ReaderPost? = ReaderPostTable.getBlogPost(siteId, postId, true)
 88→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderBlogPreview(
 89→            activity,
 90→            siteId,
 91→            post?.isFollowedByCurrentUser,
 92→            source,
 93→            readerTracker
 94→        )
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    private fun showPostActivity(activity: FragmentActivity, siteId: Long, postId: Long) {
 98→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderPostDetail(activity, siteId, postId)
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun showStatsActivityForSite(activity: FragmentActivity, siteId: Long, rangeType: FormattableRangeType) {
102→        val site = siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(siteId)
103→        if (site == null) {
104→            // One way the site can be null: new site created, receive a notification from this site,
105→            // but the site list is not yet updated in the app.
106→            ToastUtils.showToast(activity, R.string.blog_not_found)
107→            return
108→        }
109→        showStatsActivityForSite(activity, site, rangeType)
110→    }
111→
112→    private fun showStatsActivityForSite(
113→        activity: FragmentActivity,
114→        site: SiteModel,
115→        rangeType: FormattableRangeType
116→    ) {
117→        if (rangeType == FormattableRangeType.FOLLOW) {
118→            ActivityLauncher.viewAllTabbedInsightsStats(activity, FOLLOWERS, 0, site.id)
119→        } else {
120→            ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(activity, site)
121→        }
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun showWebViewActivityForUrl(activity: FragmentActivity, url: String?, rangeType: FormattableRangeType) {
125→        if (url == null || url.isEmpty()) {
126→            AppLog.e(API, "Trying to open web view activity but the URL is missing for range type $rangeType")
127→            return
128→        }
129→
130→        if (url.contains(DOMAIN_WP_COM)) {
131→            WPWebViewActivity.openUrlByUsingGlobalWPCOMCredentials(activity, url)
132→        } else {
133→            WPWebViewActivity.openURL(activity, url)
134→        }
135→    }
136→
137→    private fun showReaderPostLikeUsers(activity: FragmentActivity, blogId: Long, postId: Long) {
138→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderLikingUsers(activity, blogId, postId)
139→    }
140→
141→    private fun showReaderCommentsList(
142→        activity: FragmentActivity,
143→        siteId: Long,
144→        postId: Long,
145→        commentId: Long,
146→        source: ThreadedCommentsActionSource
147→    ) {
148→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderComments(
149→            activity,
150→            siteId,
151→            postId,
152→            commentId,
153→            source.sourceDescription
154→        )
155→    }
156→
157→    private fun showBackup(activity: FragmentActivity, siteId: Long) {
158→        val site = siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(siteId)
159→        ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(activity, site)
160→    }
161→}
162→

  2→
  3→import android.content.Intent
  4→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
  5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
  7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.LoginForResult
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenEditor
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenEditorForPost
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenEditorForSite
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenInBrowser
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenInReader
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenJetpackForDeepLink
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenLoginPrologue
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenMySite
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenNotifications
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenPages
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenPagesForSite
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenQRCodeAuthFlow
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenReader
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenStats
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenStatsForSite
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenStatsForSiteAndTimeframe
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenStatsForTimeframe
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.ShowSignInFlow
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.StartCreateSiteFlow
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.ViewPostInReader
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationSource.DEEP_LINK
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.StatsTimeframe
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.UriWrapper
 31→import javax.inject.Inject
 32→
 33→class DeepLinkNavigator
 34→@Inject constructor() {
 35→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
 36→    fun handleNavigationAction(navigateAction: NavigateAction, activity: AppCompatActivity) {
 37→        when (navigateAction) {
 38→            LoginForResult -> ActivityLauncher.loginForDeeplink(activity)
 39→            StartCreateSiteFlow -> {
 40→                ActivityLauncher.showMainActivityAndSiteCreationActivity(activity, DEEP_LINK)
 41→            }
 42→            ShowSignInFlow -> ActivityLauncher.showSignInForResultWpComOnly(activity)
 43→            OpenEditor -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorInNewStack(activity)
 44→            is OpenEditorForSite -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorForSiteInNewStack(
 45→                activity,
 46→                navigateAction.site
 47→            )
 48→            is OpenInBrowser -> {
 49→                val browserIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, navigateAction.uri.uri)
 50→                activity.startActivity(browserIntent)
 51→            }
 52→            is OpenEditorForPost -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorForPostInNewStack(
 53→                activity,
 54→                navigateAction.site,
 55→                navigateAction.postId
 56→            )
 57→            OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(activity)
 58→            is OpenStatsForTimeframe -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsForTimeframeInNewStack(
 59→                activity,
 60→                navigateAction.statsTimeframe
 61→            )
 62→            is OpenStatsForSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.site)
 63→            is OpenStatsForSiteAndTimeframe -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(
 64→                activity,
 65→                navigateAction.site,
 66→                navigateAction.statsTimeframe
 67→            )
 68→            OpenReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewReaderInNewStack(activity)
 69→            is OpenInReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewPostDeeplinkInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.uri.uri)
 70→            is ViewPostInReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewReaderPostDetailInNewStack(
 71→                activity,
 72→                navigateAction.blogId,
 73→                navigateAction.postId,
 74→                navigateAction.uri.uri
 75→            )
 76→            OpenNotifications -> ActivityLauncher.viewNotificationsInNewStack(activity)
 77→            is OpenPagesForSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewPagesInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.site)
 78→            OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewPagesInNewStack(activity)
 79→            is OpenQRCodeAuthFlow -> ActivityLauncher.startQRCodeAuthFlowInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.uri)
 80→            OpenMySite -> ActivityLauncher.viewMySiteInNewStack(activity)
 81→            OpenLoginPrologue -> ActivityLauncher.showLoginPrologue(activity)
 82→            is OpenJetpackForDeepLink ->
 83→                ActivityLauncher.openJetpackForDeeplink(activity, navigateAction.action, navigateAction.uri)
 84→            is NavigateAction.OpenJetpackStaticPosterView ->
 85→                ActivityLauncher.showJetpackStaticPoster(activity)
 86→        }
 87→        if (navigateAction != LoginForResult) {
 88→            activity.finish()
 89→        }
 90→    }
 91→
 92→    sealed class NavigateAction {
 93→        object LoginForResult : NavigateAction()
 94→        data class OpenInBrowser(val uri: UriWrapper) : NavigateAction()
 95→        data class OpenEditorForPost(val site: SiteModel, val postId: Int) : NavigateAction()
 96→        data class OpenEditorForSite(val site: SiteModel) : NavigateAction()
 97→        object OpenReader : NavigateAction()
 98→        data class OpenInReader(val uri: UriWrapper) : NavigateAction()
 99→        data class ViewPostInReader(val blogId: Long, val postId: Long, val uri: UriWrapper) : NavigateAction()
100→        object OpenEditor : NavigateAction()
101→        data class OpenStatsForSiteAndTimeframe(val site: SiteModel, val statsTimeframe: StatsTimeframe) :
102→            NavigateAction()
103→
104→        data class OpenStatsForSite(val site: SiteModel) : NavigateAction()
105→        data class OpenStatsForTimeframe(val statsTimeframe: StatsTimeframe) : NavigateAction()
106→        object OpenStats : NavigateAction()
107→        object StartCreateSiteFlow : NavigateAction()
108→        object ShowSignInFlow : NavigateAction()
109→        object OpenNotifications : NavigateAction()
110→        data class OpenPagesForSite(val site: SiteModel) : NavigateAction()
111→        object OpenPages : NavigateAction()
112→        data class OpenQRCodeAuthFlow(val uri: String) : NavigateAction()
113→        object OpenMySite : NavigateAction()
114→        object OpenLoginPrologue : NavigateAction()
115→        data class OpenJetpackForDeepLink(val action: String?, val uri: UriWrapper) : NavigateAction()
116→        object OpenJetpackStaticPosterView : NavigateAction()
117→    }
118→}

 36→class CommentListUiModelHelper @Inject constructor(

 39→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 40→) {
 41→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
 42→    internal fun buildUiModel(
 43→        commentFilter: CommentFilter,
 44→        commentsPagingResult: CommentsPagingResult,
 45→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>,
 46→        batchModerationStatus: BatchModerationStatus,
 47→        previousUiModelState: CommentsUiModel?,
 48→        onToggle: (remoteCommentId: Long, commentStatus: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
 49→        onClick: (comment: CommentEntity) -> Unit,
 50→        onLoadNextPage: (offset: Int) -> Unit,
 51→        onBatchModerationConfirmed: (comment: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
 52→        onBatchModerationCancelled: () -> Unit
 53→    ): CommentsUiModel {

 55→            buildCommentList(
 56→                commentsPagingResult,

 58→                commentFilter,
 59→                onToggle,
 60→                onClick,
 61→                onLoadNextPage
 62→            ),
 63→            buildCommentsListUiModel(
 64→                commentsPagingResult,
 65→                commentFilter,
 66→                previousUiModelState
 67→            ),
 68→            buildActionModeUiModel(selectedComments, commentFilter),
 69→            buildConfirmationDialogUiState(
 70→                batchModerationStatus,
 71→                selectedComments,
 72→                onBatchModerationConfirmed,
 73→                onBatchModerationCancelled
 74→            )
 75→        )
 76→    }

 78→    sealed class CommentsListUiModel {
 79→        object WithData : CommentsListUiModel()
 80→
 81→        data class Empty(
 82→            val title: UiString,
 83→            val image: Int? = null
 84→        ) : CommentsListUiModel()
 85→
 86→        object Loading : CommentsListUiModel()
 87→        object Refreshing : CommentsListUiModel()
 88→
 89→        object Initial : CommentsListUiModel()
 90→    }
 91→
 92→    sealed class BatchModerationStatus {
 93→        data class AskingToModerate(val commentStatus: CommentStatus) : BatchModerationStatus()
 94→        object Idle : BatchModerationStatus()
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    sealed class ConfirmationDialogUiModel {
 98→        object Hidden : ConfirmationDialogUiModel()
 99→        data class Visible(
100→            val title: Int,
101→            val message: Int,
102→            val positiveButton: Int,
103→            val negativeButton: Int,
104→            val confirmAction: () -> Unit,
105→            val cancelAction: () -> Unit
106→        ) : ConfirmationDialogUiModel()
107→    }
108→
109→    data class CommentsUiModel(
110→        val commentData: CommentList,
111→        val commentsListUiModel: CommentsListUiModel,
112→        val actionModeUiModel: ActionModeUiModel,
113→        val confirmationDialogUiModel: ConfirmationDialogUiModel
114→    ) {
115→        companion object {
116→            fun buildInitialState(): CommentsUiModel {
117→                return CommentsUiModel(
118→                    commentData = CommentList(emptyList(), false),
119→                    commentsListUiModel = CommentsListUiModel.Loading,
120→                    actionModeUiModel = Hidden,
121→                    confirmationDialogUiModel = ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Hidden
122→                )
123→            }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    internal fun buildActionModeUiModel(
128→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>?,
129→        commentListFilter: CommentFilter
130→    ): ActionModeUiModel {
131→        if (selectedComments.isNullOrEmpty()) {
132→            return Hidden
133→        }
134→        val title: UiString? = when (val numSelected = selectedComments.size) {
135→            0 -> null
136→            else -> {
137→                UiStringText(String.format(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.cab_selected), numSelected))
138→            }
139→        }
140→
141→        val approveActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(
142→            true,
143→            selectedComments.any { it.status == UNAPPROVED || it.status == CommentStatus.SPAM })
144→        val unaproveActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(
145→            true,
146→            (commentListFilter != TRASHED && commentListFilter != SPAM && commentListFilter != PENDING) &&
147→                    selectedComments.any { it.status == CommentStatus.APPROVED }
148→        )
149→        val spamActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter != SPAM, true)
150→        val unspamActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter == SPAM, true)
151→        val trashActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter != TRASHED, true)
152→        val unTrashActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter == TRASHED, true)
153→        val deleteActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter == TRASHED, true)
154→
155→        return Visible(
156→            title,
157→            approveActionUiModel,
158→            unaproveActionUiModel,
159→            spamActionUiModel,
160→            unspamActionUiModel,
161→            trashActionUiModel,
162→            unTrashActionUiModel,
163→            deleteActionUiModel
164→        )
165→    }
166→
167→    data class CommentList(val comments: List<UnifiedCommentListItem>, val hasMore: Boolean)
168→
169→    internal fun buildConfirmationDialogUiState(
170→        batchModerationStatus: BatchModerationStatus,
171→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>,
172→        onModerateComments: (comment: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
173→        onCancel: () -> Unit
174→    ): ConfirmationDialogUiModel {
175→        if (batchModerationStatus is AskingToModerate) {
176→            return when (batchModerationStatus.commentStatus) {
177→                DELETED -> {
178→                    val messageResId = if (selectedComments.size > 1) {
179→                        R.string.dlg_sure_to_delete_comments
180→                    } else {
181→                        R.string.dlg_sure_to_delete_comment
182→                    }
183→                    ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Visible(
184→                        title = R.string.delete,
185→                        message = messageResId,
186→                        positiveButton = R.string.yes,
187→                        negativeButton = R.string.no,
188→                        confirmAction = {
189→                            onModerateComments.invoke(batchModerationStatus.commentStatus)
190→                        },
191→                        cancelAction = {
192→                            onCancel.invoke()
193→                        }
194→                    )
195→                }
196→                TRASH -> {
197→                    ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Visible(
198→                        title = R.string.trash,
199→                        message = R.string.dlg_confirm_trash_comments,
200→                        positiveButton = R.string.dlg_confirm_action_trash,
201→                        negativeButton = R.string.dlg_cancel_action_dont_trash,
202→                        confirmAction = {
203→                            onModerateComments.invoke(batchModerationStatus.commentStatus)
204→                        },
205→                        cancelAction = {
206→                            onCancel.invoke()
207→                        }
208→                    )
209→                }
210→                else -> {
211→                    ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Hidden
212→                }
213→            }
214→        } else {
215→            return ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Hidden
216→        }
217→    }
218→
219→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
220→    internal fun buildCommentList(
221→        commentsDataResult: CommentsPagingResult,
222→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>?,
223→        commentFilter: CommentFilter,
224→        onToggle: (remoteCommentId: Long, commentStatus: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
225→        onClick: (comment: CommentEntity) -> Unit,
226→        onLoadNextPage: (offset: Int) -> Unit
227→    ): CommentList {
228→        val (comments, hasMore) = when (commentsDataResult) {
229→            is Failure -> Pair(
230→                commentsDataResult.cachedData.comments,
231→                commentsDataResult.cachedData.hasMore
232→            )
233→            is Loading -> Pair(listOf(), false)
234→            is Success -> Pair(commentsDataResult.data.comments, commentsDataResult.data.hasMore)
235→        }
236→
237→        val list = ArrayList<UnifiedCommentListItem>()
238→        comments.forEachIndexed { index, commentModel ->
239→            val previousItem = comments.getOrNull(index - 1)
240→            if (previousItem == null) {
241→                list.add(SubHeader(getFormattedDate(commentModel), -1))
242→            } else if (shouldAddSeparator(previousItem, commentModel)) {
243→                list.add(SubHeader(getFormattedDate(commentModel), -1))
244→            }
245→
246→            val toggleAction = ToggleAction(commentModel, onToggle)
247→            val clickAction = ClickAction(commentModel, onClick)
248→
249→            val isSelected = selectedComments?.any { it.remoteCommentId == commentModel.remoteCommentId }
250→            val isPending = commentModel.status == UNAPPROVED.toString()
251→
252→            list.add(
253→                Comment(
254→                    remoteCommentId = commentModel.remoteCommentId,
255→                    postTitle = commentModel.postTitle.orEmpty(),
256→                    authorName = commentModel.authorName.orEmpty(),
257→                    authorEmail = commentModel.authorEmail.orEmpty(),
258→                    content = commentModel.content.orEmpty(),
259→                    publishedDate = commentModel.datePublished.orEmpty(),
260→                    publishedTimestamp = commentModel.publishedTimestamp,
261→                    authorAvatarUrl = commentModel.authorProfileImageUrl.orEmpty(),
262→                    isPending = isPending,
263→                    isSelected = isSelected ?: false,
264→                    clickAction = clickAction,
265→                    toggleAction = toggleAction
266→                )
267→            )
268→        }
269→
270→        if (comments.isNotEmpty() && hasMore && commentFilter != UNREPLIED) {
271→            list.add(NextPageLoader(hasMore && commentsDataResult !is Failure, -1) {
272→                onLoadNextPage.invoke(comments.size)
273→            })
274→        }
275→        return CommentList(list.toImmutableList(), hasMore)
276→    }
277→
278→    private fun shouldAddSeparator(before: CommentEntity, after: CommentEntity): Boolean {
279→        return getFormattedDate(before) != getFormattedDate(after)
280→    }
281→
282→    private fun getFormattedDate(comment: CommentEntity): String {
283→        return dateTimeUtilsWrapper.javaDateToTimeSpan(DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(comment.datePublished))
284→    }
285→
286→    internal fun buildCommentsListUiModel(
287→        commentsDataResult: CommentsPagingResult,
288→        commentFilter: CommentFilter,
289→        previousState: CommentsUiModel?
290→    ): CommentsListUiModel {
291→        return when (commentsDataResult) {
292→            is Loading -> {
293→                if (previousState != null && previousState.commentData.comments.isNotEmpty()) {
294→                    CommentsListUiModel.Refreshing
295→                } else {
296→                    CommentsListUiModel.Loading
297→                }
298→            }
299→            is Success -> {
300→                if (commentsDataResult.data.comments.isEmpty()) {
301→                    CommentsListUiModel.Empty(
302→                        UiStringRes(getEmptyViewMessageResId(commentFilter)),
303→                        R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
304→                    )
305→                } else {
306→                    WithData
307→                }
308→            }
309→            is Failure -> {
310→                val errorMessage = commentsDataResult.error.message
311→                if (commentsDataResult.cachedData.comments.isEmpty()) {
312→                    val errorString = if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
313→                        UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message)
314→                    } else if (errorMessage.isNullOrEmpty()) {
315→                        UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_comments)
316→                    } else {
317→                        UiStringText(errorMessage)
318→                    }
319→                    CommentsListUiModel.Empty(
320→                        errorString,
321→                        R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
322→                    )
323→                } else {
324→                    return WithData
325→                }
326→            }
327→        }
328→    }
329→
330→    fun getEmptyViewMessageResId(commentFilter: CommentFilter): Int {
331→        return when (commentFilter) {
332→            CommentFilter.APPROVED -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_approved
333→            PENDING -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_pending
334→            UNREPLIED -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_unreplied
335→            SPAM -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_spam
336→            TRASHED -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_trashed
337→            CommentFilter.DELETE, CommentFilter.ALL -> R.string.comments_empty_list
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    sealed class ActionModeUiModel {
342→        data class Visible(
343→            val actionModeTitle: UiString? = null,
344→            val approveActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
345→            val unparoveActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
346→            val spamActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
347→            val unspamActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
348→            val trashActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
349→            val unTrashActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
350→            val deleteActionUiModel: ActionUiModel
351→        ) : ActionModeUiModel()
352→
353→        object Hidden : ActionModeUiModel()
354→    }
355→
356→    data class ActionUiModel(
357→        val isVisible: Boolean = false,
358→        val isEnabled: Boolean = false
359→    )
360→}

375→        assertThat(noInternetSnackbar.message).isEqualTo(UiStringText("No network"))
376→
377→        job.cancel()
378→        snackbarJob.cancel()
379→    }
380→}

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader
 2→
 3→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
 4→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
 5→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
 6→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
 7→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
 8→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 9→import org.wordpress.android.util.distinct
10→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
11→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ScopedViewModel
12→import javax.inject.Inject
13→import javax.inject.Named
14→
15→class ReaderCommentListViewModel
16→@Inject constructor(
17→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
18→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
19→    private val _scrollTo = MutableLiveData<Event<ScrollPosition>>()
20→    val scrollTo: LiveData<Event<ScrollPosition>> = _scrollTo.distinct()
21→
22→    private var scrollJob: Job? = null
23→
24→    fun scrollToPosition(position: Int, isSmooth: Boolean) {
25→        scrollJob?.cancel()
26→        scrollJob = launch {
27→            delay(300)
28→            _scrollTo.postValue(Event(ScrollPosition(position, isSmooth)))
29→        }
30→    }
31→
32→    data class ScrollPosition(val position: Int, val isSmooth: Boolean)
33→}
34→

 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}

 68→/**
 69→ * Helper class which encapsulates logic for creating UiStates for items in the PostsList.
 70→ */
 71→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 72→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 73→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 74→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 75→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 76→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 77→) {
 78→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 79→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 80→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 81→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 82→        post: PostModel,
 83→        site: SiteModel,
 84→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 85→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 86→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 87→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 88→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 89→        formattedDate: String,
 90→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 91→        isSearch: Boolean,
 92→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 93→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 94→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 95→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 96→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 97→
 98→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
 99→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
100→        }
101→        val buttonTypes = createButtonTypes(
102→            postStatus = postStatus,
103→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
104→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
105→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
106→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
107→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
108→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
109→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
110→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
111→                site,
112→                postStatus,
113→                post
114→            ),
115→        )
116→        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
117→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
118→
119→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
120→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
121→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
122→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
123→
124→        val title =
125→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
126→
127→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
128→            postStatus,
129→            formattedDate,
130→            post.authorDisplayName,
131→            authorFilterSelection,
132→            isSearch,
133→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
134→        )
135→        val statuses = getStatuses(
136→            postStatus = postStatus,
137→            post = post,
138→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
139→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
140→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
141→        )
142→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
143→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
144→        val onSelected = {
145→            when (postStatus) {
146→                TRASHED -> {
147→                    onAction.invoke(
148→                        post,
149→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
150→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
151→                    )
152→                }
153→
154→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
155→                    post,
156→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
157→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
158→                )
159→            }
160→        }
161→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
162→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
163→            localPostId = localPostId,
164→            title = title,
165→            excerpt = excerpt,
166→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
167→            postInfo = postInfo,
168→            statuses = statuses,
169→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
170→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
171→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
172→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
173→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
174→            ),
175→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
176→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
177→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
178→            ),
179→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
180→        )
181→
182→        return PostListItemUiState(
183→            data = itemUiData,
184→            moreActions = moreActions,
185→            onSelected = onSelected
186→        )
187→    }

189→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
190→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
191→        postStatus: PostStatus,
192→        formattedDate: String,
193→        displayName: String?,
194→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
195→        isSearch: Boolean,
196→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
197→    ): List<UiString> {
198→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
199→
200→        if (isSearch) {
201→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
202→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
203→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
205→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
206→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
207→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
209→            }
210→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
211→        }
212→
213→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
214→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
215→        }
216→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
217→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
218→        }
219→        return uiStrings
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
225→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
226→    }
227→
228→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
229→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236→        return parts.first()
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun getProgressBarState(
240→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
241→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
242→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
243→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
244→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
245→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
246→            } else {
247→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate
248→            }
249→        } else {
250→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden
251→        }
252→    }
253→
254→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
255→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
256→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
260→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
261→        postStatus: PostStatus,
262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels
289→    }
290→
291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {
299→                AppLog.e(
300→                    POSTS,
301→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
302→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
303→                )
304→                return null
305→            }
306→        }
307→    }
308→
309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {
316→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
317→            uploadUiState,
318→            postStatus,
319→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
320→            hasAutoSave
321→        )
322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
325→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
326→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
327→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
328→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
329→            }
330→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
331→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
332→            }
333→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
334→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }
340→        return labels
341→    }
342→
343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
344→        return when {
345→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
351→            )
352→
353→            else -> {
354→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
355→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
357→                } else {
358→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
359→                }
360→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
361→            }
362→        }
363→    }
364→
365→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
366→        return when {
367→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
368→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
369→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
370→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
371→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
372→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
373→            }
374→
375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
378→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
379→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
380→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
381→            }
382→
383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
384→        }
385→    }
386→
387→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
388→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
389→        return performingCriticalAction ||
390→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
391→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
392→    }
393→
394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(
429→                when {
430→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
431→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
432→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
433→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
434→                }
435→            )
436→        }
437→
438→        if (canShowViewButton) {
439→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowStats) {
443→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowCopy) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
448→        }
449→
450→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
451→
452→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
454→        }
455→
456→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
458→        }
459→
460→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
461→
462→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
463→    }
464→
465→    private fun sortPostListButtons(list: List<PostListButtonType>): List<PostListButtonType> {
466→        return list.sortedWith(compareBy(
467→            { it.groupId },
468→            { it.positionInGroup }
469→        ))
470→    }
471→
472→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
473→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
474→    }
475→
476→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
477→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
478→        postStatus: PostStatus
479→    ) {
480→        when {
481→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
482→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
483→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
484→        }
485→    }
486→
487→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
488→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
489→
490→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
491→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
492→        }
493→    }
494→
495→    private fun createMoreActions(
496→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
497→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
498→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
499→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
500→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
501→        }
502→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
503→    }
504→}
