182→        _uiState.value?.let { uiState ->
183→            val editedCommentEssentials = uiState.editedComment
184→            launch(bgDispatcher) {
185→                setLoadingState(SAVING)
186→                updateComment(editedCommentEssentials)
187→            }
188→        }
189→    }
190→
191→    fun onBackPressed() {
192→        _uiState.value?.let {
193→            if (it.editedComment.isNotEqualTo(it.originalComment)) {
194→                _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CANCEL_EDIT_CONFIRM)
195→            } else {
196→                _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CLOSE)
197→            }
198→        }
199→    }
200→
201→    fun onConfirmEditingDiscard() {
202→        _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CLOSE)
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun initViews() {
206→        launch {
207→            setLoadingState(LOADING)
208→
209→            val commentEssentials = withContext(bgDispatcher) {
210→                mapCommentEssentials()
211→            }
212→            if (commentEssentials.isValid()) {
213→                _uiState.value =
214→                    EditCommentUiState(
215→                        canSaveChanges = false,
216→                        shouldInitComment = true,
217→                        shouldInitWatchers = true,
218→                        showProgress = LOADING.show,
219→                        progressText = LOADING.progressText,
220→                        originalComment = commentEssentials,
221→                        editedComment = commentEssentials,
222→                        editErrorStrings = EditErrorStrings(),
223→                        inputSettings = mapInputSettings(commentEssentials)
224→                    )
225→            } else {
226→                _onSnackbarMessage.value = Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(
227→                    message = UiStringRes(R.string.error_load_comment),
228→                    onDismissAction = { _uiActionEvent.value = Event(CLOSE) }
229→                ))
230→            }
231→            delay(LOADING_DELAY_MS)
232→            setLoadingState(NOT_VISIBLE)
233→        }
234→    }
235→
236→    private suspend fun mapCommentEssentials(): CommentEssentials {
237→        val commentEntity = getCommentUseCase.execute(site, commentIdentifier.remoteCommentId)
238→        return if (commentEntity != null) {
239→            CommentEssentials(
240→                commentId = commentEntity.id,
241→                userName = commentEntity.authorName ?: "",
242→                commentText = commentEntity.content ?: "",
243→                userUrl = commentEntity.authorUrl ?: "",
244→                userEmail = commentEntity.authorEmail ?: "",
245→                isFromRegisteredUser = commentEntity.authorId > 0
246→            )
247→        } else {
248→            CommentEssentials()
249→        }
250→    }
251→
252→    private suspend fun updateComment(editedCommentEssentials: CommentEssentials) {
253→        val commentEntity =
254→            commentsStore.getCommentByLocalSiteAndRemoteId(site.id, commentIdentifier.remoteCommentId).firstOrNull()
255→        commentEntity?.run {
256→            val isCommentEntityUpdated = updateCommentEntity(this, editedCommentEssentials)
257→            if (isCommentEntityUpdated) {
258→                analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackCommentActionWithSiteDetails(
259→                    COMMENT_EDITED,
260→                    commentIdentifier.toCommentActionSource(),
261→                    site
262→                )
263→                when (commentIdentifier) {
264→                    is NotificationCommentIdentifier -> {
265→                        updateNotificationEntity()
266→                    }
267→                    is ReaderCommentIdentifier -> {
268→                        updateReaderEntity(editedCommentEssentials)
269→                    }
270→                    else -> {
271→                        _uiActionEvent.postValue(Event(DONE))
272→                        localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.requestCommentsUpdate()
273→                    }
274→                }
275→            } else {
276→                showUpdateCommentError()
277→            }
278→        } ?: showUpdateCommentError()
279→    }
280→
281→    private suspend fun updateCommentEntity(
282→        comment: CommentEntity,
283→        editedCommentEssentials: CommentEssentials
284→    ): Boolean {
285→        val updatedComment = comment.copy(
286→            authorUrl = editedCommentEssentials.userUrl,
287→            authorName = editedCommentEssentials.userName,
288→            authorEmail = editedCommentEssentials.userEmail,
289→            content = editedCommentEssentials.commentText
290→        )
291→
292→        val result = commentsStore.updateEditComment(site, updatedComment)
293→        return !result.isError
294→    }
295→
296→    private suspend fun updateNotificationEntity() {
297→        with(commentIdentifier as NotificationCommentIdentifier) {
298→            val isNotificationEntityUpdated = notificationActionsWrapper.downloadNoteAndUpdateDB(noteId)
299→            if (isNotificationEntityUpdated) {
300→                _uiActionEvent.postValue(Event(DONE))
301→                localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.requestCommentsUpdate()
302→            } else {
303→                showUpdateNotificationError()
304→            }
305→        }
306→    }
307→
308→    private suspend fun updateReaderEntity(commentEssentials: CommentEssentials) {
309→        val readerCommentIdentifier = commentIdentifier as ReaderCommentIdentifier
310→
311→        val readerComment = readerCommentTableWrapper.getComment(
312→            site.siteId,
313→            readerCommentIdentifier.postId,
314→            readerCommentIdentifier.remoteCommentId
315→        )
316→
317→        readerComment?.apply {
318→            text = commentEssentials.commentText
319→            authorName = commentEssentials.userName
320→            authorEmail = commentEssentials.userEmail
321→            authorUrl = commentEssentials.userUrl
322→            readerCommentTableWrapper.addOrUpdateComment(readerComment)
323→        }
324→        _uiActionEvent.postValue(Event(DONE))
325→        localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.requestCommentsUpdate()
326→    }
327→
328→    private suspend fun showUpdateCommentError() {
329→        setLoadingState(NOT_VISIBLE)
330→        _onSnackbarMessage.postValue(
331→            Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_edit_comment)))
332→        )
333→    }
334→
335→    private suspend fun showUpdateNotificationError() {
336→        setLoadingState(NOT_VISIBLE)
337→        _onSnackbarMessage.postValue(
338→            Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_edit_notification)))
339→        )
340→    }
341→
342→    fun onValidateField(field: String, fieldType: FieldType) {
343→        _uiState.value?.let {
344→            val fieldError = if (fieldType.isValid.invoke(field)) {
345→                null
346→            } else {
347→                resourceProvider.getString(fieldType.errorStringRes)
348→            }
349→
350→            val previousComment = it.editedComment
351→            val previousErrors = it.editErrorStrings
352→
353→            val editedComment = previousComment.copy(
354→                userName = if (fieldType.matches(USER_NAME)) field else previousComment.userName,
355→                commentText = if (fieldType.matches(COMMENT)) field else previousComment.commentText,
356→                userUrl = if (fieldType.matches(WEB_ADDRESS)) field else previousComment.userUrl,
357→                userEmail = if (fieldType.matches(USER_EMAIL)) field else previousComment.userEmail
358→            )
359→
360→            val errors = previousErrors.copy(
361→                userNameError = if (fieldType.matches(USER_NAME)) fieldError else previousErrors.userNameError,
362→                commentTextError = if (fieldType.matches(COMMENT)) fieldError else previousErrors.commentTextError,
363→                userUrlError = if (fieldType.matches(WEB_ADDRESS)) fieldError else previousErrors.userUrlError,
364→                userEmailError = if (fieldType.matches(USER_EMAIL)) fieldError else previousErrors.userEmailError
365→            )
366→
367→            _uiState.value = it.copy(
368→                canSaveChanges = editedComment.isNotEqualTo(it.originalComment) && !errors.hasError(),
369→                shouldInitComment = false,
370→                shouldInitWatchers = false,
371→                editedComment = editedComment,
372→                editErrorStrings = errors
373→            )
374→        }
375→    }
376→
377→    private fun mapInputSettings(commentEssentials: CommentEssentials) = InputSettings(
378→        enableEditName = !commentEssentials.isFromRegisteredUser,
379→        enableEditUrl = !commentEssentials.isFromRegisteredUser,
380→        enableEditEmail = !commentEssentials.isFromRegisteredUser,
381→        enableEditComment = true
382→    )
383→
384→    private fun EditErrorStrings.hasError(): Boolean {
385→        return listOf(
386→            this.commentTextError,
387→            this.userEmailError,
388→            this.userNameError,
389→            this.userUrlError
390→        ).any { !it.isNullOrEmpty() }
391→    }
392→
393→    private fun CommentIdentifier.toCommentActionSource(): AnalyticsCommentActionSource {
394→        return when (this) {
395→            is NotificationCommentIdentifier -> {
396→                AnalyticsCommentActionSource.NOTIFICATIONS
397→            }
398→            is ReaderCommentIdentifier -> {
399→                AnalyticsCommentActionSource.READER
400→            }
401→            is SiteCommentIdentifier -> {
402→                AnalyticsCommentActionSource.SITE_COMMENTS
403→            }
404→        }
405→    }
406→
407→    companion object {
408→        private const val LOADING_DELAY_MS = 300L
409→    }
410→}
411→

28→fun trackPostListAction(site: SiteModel, buttonType: PostListButtonType, postData: PostModel, statsEvent: Stat) {
29→    val properties = HashMap<String, Any?>()
30→    if (!postData.isLocalDraft) {
31→        properties["post_id"] = postData.remotePostId
32→    }
33→
34→    properties["action"] = when (buttonType) {
35→        BUTTON_EDIT -> {
36→            properties[AnalyticsUtils.HAS_GUTENBERG_BLOCKS_KEY] = PostUtils
37→                .contentContainsGutenbergBlocks(postData.content)
38→            "edit"
39→        }
40→        BUTTON_RETRY -> "retry"
41→        BUTTON_SUBMIT -> "submit"
42→        BUTTON_VIEW -> "view"
43→        BUTTON_PREVIEW -> "preview"
44→        BUTTON_STATS -> "stats"
45→        BUTTON_TRASH -> "trash"
46→        BUTTON_COPY -> "copy"
47→        BUTTON_DELETE,
48→        BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete"
49→        BUTTON_PUBLISH -> "publish"
50→        BUTTON_SYNC -> "sync"
51→        BUTTON_MORE -> "more"
52→        BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> "move_to_draft"
53→        BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD -> "cancel_pending_auto_upload"
54→        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG -> "show_move_trashed_post_to_draft_post_dialog"
55→        BUTTON_COPY_URL -> "copy_url"
56→        BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> "promote_with_blaze"
57→        BUTTON_COMMENTS -> "comments"
58→    }
59→
60→    AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(statsEvent, site, properties)
61→}

  2→
  3→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
  4→import org.wordpress.android.R
  5→import org.wordpress.android.datasets.ReaderPostTable
  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.tools.FormattableRange
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.tools.FormattableRangeType
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderPost
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.WPWebViewActivity
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.ReaderActivityLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.comments.ThreadedCommentsActionSource
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.comments.ThreadedCommentsActionSource.ACTIVITY_LOG_DETAIL
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.tracker.ReaderTracker
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.ReaderUtils
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.StatsViewType.FOLLOWERS
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 20→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T.API
 21→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 22→import javax.inject.Inject
 23→
 24→private const val DOMAIN_WP_COM = "wordpress.com"
 25→
 26→class FormattableContentClickHandler @Inject constructor(
 27→    val siteStore: SiteStore,
 28→    val readerTracker: ReaderTracker
 29→) {
 30→    fun onClick(
 31→        activity: FragmentActivity,
 32→        clickedSpan: FormattableRange,
 33→        source: String
 34→    ) {
 35→        if (activity.isFinishing) {
 36→            return
 37→        }
 38→        val id = clickedSpan.id ?: 0
 39→        val siteId = clickedSpan.siteId ?: 0
 40→        val postId = clickedSpan.postId ?: 0
 41→        when (val rangeType = clickedSpan.rangeType()) {
 42→            FormattableRangeType.SITE ->
 43→                // Show blog preview
 44→                showBlogPreviewActivity(activity, id, postId, source)
 45→            FormattableRangeType.USER ->
 46→                // Show blog preview
 47→                showBlogPreviewActivity(activity, siteId, postId, source)
 48→            FormattableRangeType.PAGE, FormattableRangeType.POST ->
 49→                // Show post detail
 50→                showPostActivity(activity, siteId, id)
 51→            FormattableRangeType.COMMENT -> {
 52→                // Load the comment in the reader list if it exists, otherwise show a webview
 53→                val rootId = clickedSpan.postId ?: clickedSpan.rootId ?: 0
 54→                if (ReaderUtils.postAndCommentExists(siteId, rootId, id)) {
 55→                    showReaderCommentsList(activity, siteId, rootId, id, ACTIVITY_LOG_DETAIL)
 56→                } else {
 57→                    showWebViewActivityForUrl(activity, clickedSpan.url, rangeType)
 58→                }
 59→            }
 60→            FormattableRangeType.STAT, FormattableRangeType.FOLLOW ->
 61→                // We can open native stats if the site is a wpcom or Jetpack sites
 62→                showStatsActivityForSite(activity, siteId, rangeType)
 63→            FormattableRangeType.LIKE -> if (ReaderPostTable.postExists(siteId, id)) {
 64→                showReaderPostLikeUsers(activity, siteId, id)
 65→            } else {
 66→                showPostActivity(activity, siteId, id)
 67→            }
 68→            FormattableRangeType.REWIND_DOWNLOAD_READY -> showBackup(activity, siteId)
 69→            FormattableRangeType.BLOCKQUOTE,
 70→            FormattableRangeType.NOTICON,
 71→            FormattableRangeType.MATCH,
 72→            FormattableRangeType.MEDIA,
 73→            FormattableRangeType.UNKNOWN -> {
 74→                showWebViewActivityForUrl(activity, clickedSpan.url, rangeType)
 75→            }
 76→            FormattableRangeType.SCAN -> Unit // Do nothing
 77→            FormattableRangeType.B -> Unit // Do nothing
 78→        }
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun showBlogPreviewActivity(
 82→        activity: FragmentActivity,
 83→        siteId: Long,
 84→        postId: Long,
 85→        source: String
 86→    ) {
 87→        val post: ReaderPost? = ReaderPostTable.getBlogPost(siteId, postId, true)
 88→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderBlogPreview(
 89→            activity,
 90→            siteId,
 91→            post?.isFollowedByCurrentUser,
 92→            source,
 93→            readerTracker
 94→        )
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    private fun showPostActivity(activity: FragmentActivity, siteId: Long, postId: Long) {
 98→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderPostDetail(activity, siteId, postId)
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun showStatsActivityForSite(activity: FragmentActivity, siteId: Long, rangeType: FormattableRangeType) {
102→        val site = siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(siteId)
103→        if (site == null) {
104→            // One way the site can be null: new site created, receive a notification from this site,
105→            // but the site list is not yet updated in the app.
106→            ToastUtils.showToast(activity, R.string.blog_not_found)
107→            return
108→        }
109→        showStatsActivityForSite(activity, site, rangeType)
110→    }
111→
112→    private fun showStatsActivityForSite(
113→        activity: FragmentActivity,
114→        site: SiteModel,
115→        rangeType: FormattableRangeType
116→    ) {
117→        if (rangeType == FormattableRangeType.FOLLOW) {
118→            ActivityLauncher.viewAllTabbedInsightsStats(activity, FOLLOWERS, 0, site.id)
119→        } else {
120→            ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(activity, site)
121→        }
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun showWebViewActivityForUrl(activity: FragmentActivity, url: String?, rangeType: FormattableRangeType) {
125→        if (url == null || url.isEmpty()) {
126→            AppLog.e(API, "Trying to open web view activity but the URL is missing for range type $rangeType")
127→            return
128→        }
129→
130→        if (url.contains(DOMAIN_WP_COM)) {
131→            WPWebViewActivity.openUrlByUsingGlobalWPCOMCredentials(activity, url)
132→        } else {
133→            WPWebViewActivity.openURL(activity, url)
134→        }
135→    }
136→
137→    private fun showReaderPostLikeUsers(activity: FragmentActivity, blogId: Long, postId: Long) {
138→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderLikingUsers(activity, blogId, postId)
139→    }
140→
141→    private fun showReaderCommentsList(
142→        activity: FragmentActivity,
143→        siteId: Long,
144→        postId: Long,
145→        commentId: Long,
146→        source: ThreadedCommentsActionSource
147→    ) {
148→        ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderComments(
149→            activity,
150→            siteId,
151→            postId,
152→            commentId,
153→            source.sourceDescription
154→        )
155→    }
156→
157→    private fun showBackup(activity: FragmentActivity, siteId: Long) {
158→        val site = siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(siteId)
159→        ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(activity, site)
160→    }
161→}

 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.OpenStats

 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.StartCreateSiteFlow
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.DeepLinkNavigator.NavigateAction.ViewPostInReader
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationSource.DEEP_LINK

 32→
 33→class DeepLinkNavigator
 34→@Inject constructor() {
 35→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
 36→    fun handleNavigationAction(navigateAction: NavigateAction, activity: AppCompatActivity) {
 37→        when (navigateAction) {
 38→            LoginForResult -> ActivityLauncher.loginForDeeplink(activity)
 39→            StartCreateSiteFlow -> {
 40→                ActivityLauncher.showMainActivityAndSiteCreationActivity(activity, DEEP_LINK)
 41→            }
 42→            ShowSignInFlow -> ActivityLauncher.showSignInForResultWpComOnly(activity)
 43→            OpenEditor -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorInNewStack(activity)
 44→            is OpenEditorForSite -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorForSiteInNewStack(
 45→                activity,
 46→                navigateAction.site
 47→            )
 48→            is OpenInBrowser -> {
 49→                val browserIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, navigateAction.uri.uri)
 50→                activity.startActivity(browserIntent)
 51→            }
 52→            is OpenEditorForPost -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorForPostInNewStack(
 53→                activity,
 54→                navigateAction.site,
 55→                navigateAction.postId
 56→            )
 57→            OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(activity)
 58→            is OpenStatsForTimeframe -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsForTimeframeInNewStack(
 59→                activity,
 60→                navigateAction.statsTimeframe
 61→            )
 62→            is OpenStatsForSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.site)
 63→            is OpenStatsForSiteAndTimeframe -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(
 64→                activity,
 65→                navigateAction.site,
 66→                navigateAction.statsTimeframe
 67→            )
 68→            OpenReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewReaderInNewStack(activity)
 69→            is OpenInReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewPostDeeplinkInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.uri.uri)
 70→            is ViewPostInReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewReaderPostDetailInNewStack(
 71→                activity,
 72→                navigateAction.blogId,
 73→                navigateAction.postId,
 74→                navigateAction.uri.uri
 75→            )
 76→            OpenNotifications -> ActivityLauncher.viewNotificationsInNewStack(activity)
 77→            is OpenPagesForSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewPagesInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.site)
 78→            OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewPagesInNewStack(activity)
 79→            is OpenQRCodeAuthFlow -> ActivityLauncher.startQRCodeAuthFlowInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.uri)
 80→            OpenMySite -> ActivityLauncher.viewMySiteInNewStack(activity)
 81→            OpenLoginPrologue -> ActivityLauncher.showLoginPrologue(activity)
 82→            is OpenJetpackForDeepLink ->
 83→                ActivityLauncher.openJetpackForDeeplink(activity, navigateAction.action, navigateAction.uri)
 84→            is NavigateAction.OpenJetpackStaticPosterView ->
 85→                ActivityLauncher.showJetpackStaticPoster(activity)
 86→        }
 87→        if (navigateAction != LoginForResult) {
 88→            activity.finish()
 89→        }
 90→    }

 36→class CommentListUiModelHelper @Inject constructor(
 37→    private val resourceProvider: ResourceProvider,
 38→    private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper,
 39→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 40→) {
 41→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
 42→    internal fun buildUiModel(
 43→        commentFilter: CommentFilter,
 44→        commentsPagingResult: CommentsPagingResult,
 45→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>,
 46→        batchModerationStatus: BatchModerationStatus,
 47→        previousUiModelState: CommentsUiModel?,
 48→        onToggle: (remoteCommentId: Long, commentStatus: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
 49→        onClick: (comment: CommentEntity) -> Unit,
 50→        onLoadNextPage: (offset: Int) -> Unit,
 51→        onBatchModerationConfirmed: (comment: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
 52→        onBatchModerationCancelled: () -> Unit
 53→    ): CommentsUiModel {
 54→        return CommentsUiModel(
 55→            buildCommentList(
 56→                commentsPagingResult,
 57→                selectedComments,
 58→                commentFilter,
 59→                onToggle,
 60→                onClick,
 61→                onLoadNextPage
 62→            ),
 63→            buildCommentsListUiModel(
 64→                commentsPagingResult,
 65→                commentFilter,
 66→                previousUiModelState
 67→            ),
 68→            buildActionModeUiModel(selectedComments, commentFilter),
 69→            buildConfirmationDialogUiState(
 70→                batchModerationStatus,
 71→                selectedComments,
 72→                onBatchModerationConfirmed,
 73→                onBatchModerationCancelled
 74→            )
 75→        )
 76→    }

 78→    sealed class CommentsListUiModel {
 79→        object WithData : CommentsListUiModel()

 82→            val title: UiString,
 83→            val image: Int? = null
 84→        ) : CommentsListUiModel()

 97→    sealed class ConfirmationDialogUiModel {
 98→        object Hidden : ConfirmationDialogUiModel()
 99→        data class Visible(
100→            val title: Int,
101→            val message: Int,
102→            val positiveButton: Int,
103→            val negativeButton: Int,
104→            val confirmAction: () -> Unit,
105→            val cancelAction: () -> Unit
106→        ) : ConfirmationDialogUiModel()

109→    data class CommentsUiModel(
110→        val commentData: CommentList,
111→        val commentsListUiModel: CommentsListUiModel,
112→        val actionModeUiModel: ActionModeUiModel,
113→        val confirmationDialogUiModel: ConfirmationDialogUiModel
114→    ) {
115→        companion object {
116→            fun buildInitialState(): CommentsUiModel {
117→                return CommentsUiModel(
118→                    commentData = CommentList(emptyList(), false),
119→                    commentsListUiModel = CommentsListUiModel.Loading,
120→                    actionModeUiModel = Hidden,
121→                    confirmationDialogUiModel = ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Hidden
122→                )
123→            }
124→        }
125→    }

127→    internal fun buildActionModeUiModel(
128→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>?,
129→        commentListFilter: CommentFilter
130→    ): ActionModeUiModel {
131→        if (selectedComments.isNullOrEmpty()) {
132→            return Hidden
133→        }
134→        val title: UiString? = when (val numSelected = selectedComments.size) {
135→            0 -> null
136→            else -> {
137→                UiStringText(String.format(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.cab_selected), numSelected))
138→            }
139→        }
140→
141→        val approveActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(
142→            true,
143→            selectedComments.any { it.status == UNAPPROVED || it.status == CommentStatus.SPAM })
144→        val unaproveActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(
145→            true,
146→            (commentListFilter != TRASHED && commentListFilter != SPAM && commentListFilter != PENDING) &&
147→                    selectedComments.any { it.status == CommentStatus.APPROVED }
148→        )
149→        val spamActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter != SPAM, true)
150→        val unspamActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter == SPAM, true)
151→        val trashActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter != TRASHED, true)
152→        val unTrashActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter == TRASHED, true)
153→        val deleteActionUiModel = ActionUiModel(commentListFilter == TRASHED, true)
154→
155→        return Visible(
156→            title,
157→            approveActionUiModel,
158→            unaproveActionUiModel,
159→            spamActionUiModel,
160→            unspamActionUiModel,
161→            trashActionUiModel,
162→            unTrashActionUiModel,
163→            deleteActionUiModel
164→        )
165→    }

167→    data class CommentList(val comments: List<UnifiedCommentListItem>, val hasMore: Boolean)

169→    internal fun buildConfirmationDialogUiState(
170→        batchModerationStatus: BatchModerationStatus,
171→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>,
172→        onModerateComments: (comment: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
173→        onCancel: () -> Unit
174→    ): ConfirmationDialogUiModel {
175→        if (batchModerationStatus is AskingToModerate) {
176→            return when (batchModerationStatus.commentStatus) {
177→                DELETED -> {
178→                    val messageResId = if (selectedComments.size > 1) {
179→                        R.string.dlg_sure_to_delete_comments
180→                    } else {
181→                        R.string.dlg_sure_to_delete_comment
182→                    }
183→                    ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Visible(
184→                        title = R.string.delete,
185→                        message = messageResId,
186→                        positiveButton = R.string.yes,
187→                        negativeButton = R.string.no,
188→                        confirmAction = {
189→                            onModerateComments.invoke(batchModerationStatus.commentStatus)
190→                        },
191→                        cancelAction = {
192→                            onCancel.invoke()
193→                        }
194→                    )
195→                }
196→                TRASH -> {
197→                    ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Visible(
198→                        title = R.string.trash,
199→                        message = R.string.dlg_confirm_trash_comments,
200→                        positiveButton = R.string.dlg_confirm_action_trash,
201→                        negativeButton = R.string.dlg_cancel_action_dont_trash,
202→                        confirmAction = {
203→                            onModerateComments.invoke(batchModerationStatus.commentStatus)
204→                        },
205→                        cancelAction = {
206→                            onCancel.invoke()
207→                        }
208→                    )
209→                }
210→                else -> {
211→                    ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Hidden
212→                }
213→            }
214→        } else {
215→            return ConfirmationDialogUiModel.Hidden
216→        }
217→    }
218→
219→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
220→    internal fun buildCommentList(
221→        commentsDataResult: CommentsPagingResult,
222→        selectedComments: List<SelectedComment>?,
223→        commentFilter: CommentFilter,
224→        onToggle: (remoteCommentId: Long, commentStatus: CommentStatus) -> Unit,
225→        onClick: (comment: CommentEntity) -> Unit,
226→        onLoadNextPage: (offset: Int) -> Unit
227→    ): CommentList {
228→        val (comments, hasMore) = when (commentsDataResult) {
229→            is Failure -> Pair(
230→                commentsDataResult.cachedData.comments,
231→                commentsDataResult.cachedData.hasMore
232→            )
233→            is Loading -> Pair(listOf(), false)
234→            is Success -> Pair(commentsDataResult.data.comments, commentsDataResult.data.hasMore)
235→        }
236→
237→        val list = ArrayList<UnifiedCommentListItem>()
238→        comments.forEachIndexed { index, commentModel ->
239→            val previousItem = comments.getOrNull(index - 1)
240→            if (previousItem == null) {
241→                list.add(SubHeader(getFormattedDate(commentModel), -1))
242→            } else if (shouldAddSeparator(previousItem, commentModel)) {
243→                list.add(SubHeader(getFormattedDate(commentModel), -1))
244→            }
245→
246→            val toggleAction = ToggleAction(commentModel, onToggle)
247→            val clickAction = ClickAction(commentModel, onClick)
248→
249→            val isSelected = selectedComments?.any { it.remoteCommentId == commentModel.remoteCommentId }
250→            val isPending = commentModel.status == UNAPPROVED.toString()
251→
252→            list.add(
253→                Comment(
254→                    remoteCommentId = commentModel.remoteCommentId,
255→                    postTitle = commentModel.postTitle.orEmpty(),
256→                    authorName = commentModel.authorName.orEmpty(),
257→                    authorEmail = commentModel.authorEmail.orEmpty(),
258→                    content = commentModel.content.orEmpty(),
259→                    publishedDate = commentModel.datePublished.orEmpty(),
260→                    publishedTimestamp = commentModel.publishedTimestamp,
261→                    authorAvatarUrl = commentModel.authorProfileImageUrl.orEmpty(),
262→                    isPending = isPending,
263→                    isSelected = isSelected ?: false,
264→                    clickAction = clickAction,
265→                    toggleAction = toggleAction
266→                )
267→            )
268→        }
269→
270→        if (comments.isNotEmpty() && hasMore && commentFilter != UNREPLIED) {
271→            list.add(NextPageLoader(hasMore && commentsDataResult !is Failure, -1) {
272→                onLoadNextPage.invoke(comments.size)
273→            })
274→        }
275→        return CommentList(list.toImmutableList(), hasMore)
276→    }
277→
278→    private fun shouldAddSeparator(before: CommentEntity, after: CommentEntity): Boolean {
279→        return getFormattedDate(before) != getFormattedDate(after)
280→    }
281→
282→    private fun getFormattedDate(comment: CommentEntity): String {
283→        return dateTimeUtilsWrapper.javaDateToTimeSpan(DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(comment.datePublished))
284→    }
285→
286→    internal fun buildCommentsListUiModel(
287→        commentsDataResult: CommentsPagingResult,
288→        commentFilter: CommentFilter,
289→        previousState: CommentsUiModel?
290→    ): CommentsListUiModel {
291→        return when (commentsDataResult) {
292→            is Loading -> {
293→                if (previousState != null && previousState.commentData.comments.isNotEmpty()) {
294→                    CommentsListUiModel.Refreshing
295→                } else {
296→                    CommentsListUiModel.Loading
297→                }
298→            }
299→            is Success -> {
300→                if (commentsDataResult.data.comments.isEmpty()) {
301→                    CommentsListUiModel.Empty(
302→                        UiStringRes(getEmptyViewMessageResId(commentFilter)),
303→                        R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
304→                    )
305→                } else {
306→                    WithData
307→                }
308→            }
309→            is Failure -> {
310→                val errorMessage = commentsDataResult.error.message
311→                if (commentsDataResult.cachedData.comments.isEmpty()) {
312→                    val errorString = if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
313→                        UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message)
314→                    } else if (errorMessage.isNullOrEmpty()) {
315→                        UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_comments)
316→                    } else {
317→                        UiStringText(errorMessage)
318→                    }
319→                    CommentsListUiModel.Empty(
320→                        errorString,
321→                        R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
322→                    )
323→                } else {
324→                    return WithData
325→                }
326→            }
327→        }
328→    }
329→
330→    fun getEmptyViewMessageResId(commentFilter: CommentFilter): Int {
331→        return when (commentFilter) {
332→            CommentFilter.APPROVED -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_approved
333→            PENDING -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_pending
334→            UNREPLIED -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_unreplied
335→            SPAM -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_spam
336→            TRASHED -> R.string.comments_empty_list_filtered_trashed
337→            CommentFilter.DELETE, CommentFilter.ALL -> R.string.comments_empty_list
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    sealed class ActionModeUiModel {
342→        data class Visible(
343→            val actionModeTitle: UiString? = null,
344→            val approveActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
345→            val unparoveActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
346→            val spamActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
347→            val unspamActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
348→            val trashActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
349→            val unTrashActionUiModel: ActionUiModel,
350→            val deleteActionUiModel: ActionUiModel
351→        ) : ActionModeUiModel()
352→
353→        object Hidden : ActionModeUiModel()
354→    }
355→
356→    data class ActionUiModel(
357→        val isVisible: Boolean = false,
358→        val isEnabled: Boolean = false
359→    )
360→}

231→        val result = mutableListOf<CommentsUiModel>()

246→    @Test

 3→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
 4→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
 5→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
 6→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job

15→class ReaderCommentListViewModel
16→@Inject constructor(
17→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
18→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
19→    private val _scrollTo = MutableLiveData<Event<ScrollPosition>>()
20→    val scrollTo: LiveData<Event<ScrollPosition>> = _scrollTo.distinct()
21→
22→    private var scrollJob: Job? = null
23→
24→    fun scrollToPosition(position: Int, isSmooth: Boolean) {
25→        scrollJob?.cancel()
26→        scrollJob = launch {
27→            delay(300)
28→            _scrollTo.postValue(Event(ScrollPosition(position, isSmooth)))
29→        }
30→    }
31→
32→    data class ScrollPosition(val position: Int, val isSmooth: Boolean)
33→}
